Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Sit on the stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:2 Place your hands on the ball beside your hips, fingers pointing forward.
Step:3 Engage your triceps and push through your hands to lift your body off the ball, straightening your arms.
Step:4 Lower your body back down by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameEn: barbell seated close grip behind neck triceps extension
exercises.nameRu: Разгибание со штангой за голову узким хватом сидя
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold the barbell with a close grip behind your neck, palms facing forward.
Step:3 Keep your elbows close to your head and slowly lower the barbell towards the back of your head.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Sit on the edge of a chair or bench with your hands next to your hips, fingers pointing forward.
Step:2 Slide your butt off the front of the chair with your legs extended in front of you.
Step:3 Straighten your arms, keeping a little bend in your elbows to keep tension on your triceps and off your elbow joints.
Step:4 Slowly bend your elbows to lower your body toward the floor until your elbows are at about a 90-degree angle.
Step:5 Once you reach the bottom of the movement, press down into the chair to straighten your elbows, returning to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameEn: medicine ball close grip push up
instructions: Step:1 Start in a high plank position with your hands on the medicine ball, shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides.
Step:3 Push back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameRu: Разгибание с EZ-грифом на наклонной скамье
instructions: Step:1 Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Sit on the bench with your back against the pad and hold the ez barbell with an overhand grip.
Step:3 Extend your arms fully overhead, keeping your elbows close to your head.
Step:4 Lower the barbell behind your head by bending your elbows, keeping your upper arms stationary.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameEn: cable standing one arm triceps extension
exercises.nameRu: Разгибание на блоке стоя одной рукой
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, facing the cable machine.
Step:2 Hold the cable handle with your right hand, palm facing down, and position your arm so that it is fully extended and parallel to the ground.
Step:3 Keep your elbow stationary and close to your body.
Step:4 Slowly bend your elbow, lowering the cable handle towards the back of your head.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then extend your arm back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides and perform the exercise with your left arm.
Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed against the bench.
Step:2 Grasp the ez barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Lower the barbell to your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in close to your body.
Step:4 Push the barbell back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your head at the end of the bench.
Step:2 Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart, and extend your arms straight up over your chest.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, slowly lower the barbell towards your forehead by bending your elbows.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameRu: Разгибания на верхнем блоке с канатом
instructions: Step:1 Attach a rope attachment to a high pulley on a cable machine.
Step:2 Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart and a slight bend in your knees.
Step:3 Grasp the rope with an overhand grip, palms facing each other.
Step:4 Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary throughout the exercise.
Step:5 Exhale and push the rope downward by extending your elbows until your arms are fully extended.
Step:6 Pause for a moment, then inhale and slowly return to the starting position by allowing your elbows to flex.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Hold the cable handle in each hand with your palms facing inwards and your arms bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, extend your forearms backwards until your arms are fully extended.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Start by placing your hands on a raised surface, such as a bench or parallel bars, with your palms facing down and fingers pointing forward.
Step:2 Extend your legs out in front of you, keeping your heels on the ground and your body straight.
Step:3 Lower your body by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides, until your upper arms are parallel to the ground.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then push through your palms to straighten your arms and lift your body back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Sit on a bench or chair with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold the cable handle with your right hand and place your elbow on the inside of your right knee.
Step:3 Extend your arm fully, keeping your elbow stationary and close to your knee.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arm back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand.
Step:2 Take a step forward with your right foot, lowering your body into a lunge position.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and your chest up.
Step:4 Extend your arms straight overhead, keeping your elbows close to your ears.
Step:5 Lower the dumbbells behind your head by bending your elbows.
Step:6 Pause for a moment, then straighten your arms to return to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat the movement for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs and repeat.

exercises.nameEn: dumbbell standing bent over two arm triceps extension
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand.
Step:2 Bend forward at the waist, keeping your back straight and your knees slightly bent.
Step:3 Extend your arms straight back, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:4 Slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameEn: dumbbell lying one arm pronated triceps extension
exercises.nameRu: Разгибание с гантелями одной рукой лёжа
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your back and head supported, and your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in one hand with your palm facing down, and extend your arm straight up above your shoulder.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arm stationary, slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head by bending your elbow.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then extend your arm back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
Step:1 Start in a push-up position with your hands placed close together, directly under your shoulders.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand, resting them on the ground.
Step:3 Lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides.
Step:4 Push through your palms to extend your arms and return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameRu: Разгибание с гантелями стоя одной рукой
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in one hand.
Step:2 Raise the dumbbell overhead, fully extending your arm.
Step:3 Keep your upper arm close to your head and perpendicular to the ground.
Step:4 Slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head, bending your elbow.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then raise the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:3 Extend your arms straight back, squeezing your triceps at the top of the movement.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed against the bench.
Step:2 Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Lower the barbell to your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in close to your body.
Step:4 Push the barbell back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameRu: Отведение назад с гантелями попеременные стоя
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:3 Extend your arms straight back, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat with the other arm, alternating sides with each repetition.
Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back against the pad.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and fully extend your arms in front of you.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, slowly lower the handles towards your forehead by bending your elbows.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the handles back up to the starting position by extending your arms.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Sit on a bench with your hands gripping the edge, fingers pointing forward.
Step:2 Slide your butt off the bench, supporting your weight with your hands.
Step:3 Lower your body by bending your elbows until your upper arms are parallel to the floor.
Step:4 Push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameEn: dumbbell one arm french press on exercise ball
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in one hand with your palm facing up and your elbow bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:3 Extend your arm straight up towards the ceiling, keeping your elbow stationary.
Step:4 Slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

exercises.nameRu: Жим со штангой на наклонной скамье
instructions: Step:1 Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Lie back on the bench and grasp the barbell with a reverse grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Unrack the barbell and lower it towards your upper chest, keeping your elbows tucked in.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the barbell back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Sit on the edge of a bench or chair with your hands gripping the edge, fingers pointing forward.
Step:2 Slide your butt off the bench, supporting your weight with your hands.
Step:3 Lower your body by bending your elbows until your upper arms are parallel to the floor.
Step:4 Push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameEn: dumbbell one arm triceps extension (on bench)
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in one hand and place your other hand on the bench for support.
Step:3 Raise the dumbbell overhead, keeping your upper arm close to your head and your elbow pointing forward.
Step:4 Lower the dumbbell behind your head by bending your elbow, keeping your upper arm stationary.
Step:5 Extend your arm back up to the starting position, fully straightening your elbow.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed against the bench.
Step:2 Grasp the barbell with a reverse grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Lift the barbell off the rack and hold it directly above your chest with your arms fully extended.
Step:4 Slowly lower the barbell down towards your chest, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:5 Pause for a moment when the barbell is just above your chest.
Step:6 Push the barbell back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameEn: smith machine decline close grip bench press
exercises.nameRu: Жим лёжа в Смите узким хватом на скамье с отриц. наклоном
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the bench on the smith machine to a decline position.
Step:2 Lie down on the bench with your feet firmly planted on the ground.
Step:3 Grasp the barbell with a close grip, slightly narrower than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:5 Pause for a moment when the barbell is just above your chest.
Step:6 Push the barbell back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameEn: cable reverse grip triceps pushdown (sz-bar) (with arm blaster)
exercises.nameRu: Разгибание на блоке на блоке обратным хватом
instructions: Step:1 Attach a straight bar to the cable machine at the highest setting.
Step:2 Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the bar with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and your hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary throughout the exercise.
Step:5 Engage your triceps and slowly push the bar down until your arms are fully extended.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly return the bar to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameEn: barbell lying triceps extension skull crusher
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your head at the end of the bench.
Step:2 Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart, and extend your arms straight up over your chest.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, slowly lower the barbell towards your forehead by bending your elbows.
Step:4 Pause for a moment when the barbell is just above your forehead, then extend your arms back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Start in a high plank position with your hands close together, forming a diamond shape with your thumbs and index fingers.
Step:2 Keep your body in a straight line from head to toe, engaging your core and glutes.
Step:3 Lower your chest towards the diamond shape formed by your hands, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameRu: Разгибание со штангой над головой сидя
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a barbell with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart, and raise it overhead.
Step:3 Lower the barbell behind your head by bending your elbows, keeping your upper arms close to your head.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then extend your arms to raise the barbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the ez barbell with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Raise the barbell above your head, fully extending your arms.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms close to your head, slowly lower the barbell behind your head by bending your elbows.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Adjust the seat height and footrests to a comfortable position.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, palms facing down.
Step:3 Sit up straight with your feet flat on the footrests.
Step:4 Extend your arms straight out in front of you, keeping your elbows slightly bent.
Step:5 Engage your triceps and push the handles down towards your thighs.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Stand facing away from a bench or chair, with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Place one hand on the bench or chair behind you, fingers pointing towards your body.
Step:3 Extend your legs out in front of you, keeping your heels on the ground.
Step:4 Bend your elbows and lower your body towards the ground, keeping your back close to the bench or chair.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your palms to straighten your arms and return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides and repeat with the other arm.
Step:1 Sit on a flat bench with a dumbbell in each hand, resting on your thighs.
Step:2 Using your thighs to help raise the dumbbells, lift the dumbbells one at a time so that you can hold them in front of you at shoulder width.
Step:3 Once at shoulder width, rotate your wrists forward so that the palms of your hands are facing away from you. This will be your starting position.
Step:4 As you breathe in, slowly lower the dumbbells to your side until they are about level with your chest.
Step:5 As you exhale, use your triceps to lift the dumbbells back to the starting position. Make sure to use only your triceps and do not use your forearms or biceps to help lift the dumbbells.
Step:6 After a second pause at the contracted position, repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.

exercises.nameEn: barbell incline close grip bench press
exercises.nameRu: Жим лёжа со штангой узким хватом на наклонной скамье
instructions: Step:1 Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Lie down on the bench with your feet flat on the ground.
Step:3 Grasp the barbell with a close grip, slightly narrower than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:5 Pause for a moment when the barbell touches your chest.
Step:6 Push the barbell back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameEn: dumbbell seated bent over alternate kickback
exercises.nameRu: Отведение назад с гантелями попеременные сидя
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing inwards.
Step:2 Bend forward at the waist, keeping your back straight and parallel to the ground.
Step:3 Extend one arm straight back, keeping it close to your body, until your arm is fully extended.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat with the other arm.
Step:6 Continue alternating arms for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameRu: Отжимание на брусьях в рычажном тренажёре сидя
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height so that your feet are flat on the ground and your knees are at a 90-degree angle.
Step:2 Grasp the handles of the leverage machine with your palms facing down and your arms fully extended.
Step:3 Slowly lower your body by bending your elbows until your upper arms are parallel to the ground.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameEn: dumbbell palms in incline bench press
exercises.nameRu: Жим лёжа с гантелями на наклонной скамье
instructions: Step:1 Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Sit on the bench with your back against the backrest and feet flat on the ground.
Step:3 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip, palms facing inwards.
Step:4 Extend your arms straight up above your chest, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:5 Lower the dumbbells slowly towards your shoulders, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then press the dumbbells back up to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Position yourself between two parallel bars with your arms fully extended and your body straight.
Step:2 Lower your body by bending your elbows until your upper arms are parallel to the ground.
Step:3 Pause for a moment, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameEn: dumbbell seated reverse grip one arm overhead tricep extension
exercises.nameRu: Разгибание с гантелями обратным хватом над головой одной рукой сидя
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell with an underhand grip and extend your arm straight up overhead.
Step:3 Lower the dumbbell behind your head by bending your elbow, keeping your upper arm stationary.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then extend your arm back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
Step:1 Sit on the edge of a bench or chair with your hands gripping the edge, fingers pointing forward.
Step:2 Slide your butt off the bench, supporting your weight with your hands.
Step:3 Bend your elbows and lower your body towards the ground, keeping your back close to the bench.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameEn: ez barbell decline close grip face press
exercises.nameRu: Жим с EZ-грифом узким хватом на скамье с отриц. наклоном
instructions: Step:1 Lie on a decline bench with your head lower than your feet.
Step:2 Grasp the ez barbell with a close grip, palms facing each other.
Step:3 Extend your arms straight up above your chest, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:4 Lower the barbell towards your forehead by bending your elbows.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then press the barbell back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with a dumbbell in one hand and your arm fully extended above your chest.
Step:2 Lower the dumbbell in a controlled manner towards your forehead, keeping your upper arm stationary.
Step:3 Pause briefly at the bottom of the movement, then extend your arm back to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

exercises.nameEn: dumbbell incline one arm hammer press
exercises.nameRu: Жим с гантелями на наклонной скамье одной рукой
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an incline bench with a dumbbell in one hand, resting on your thigh.
Step:2 Lean back on the bench and use your thigh to help raise the dumbbell to shoulder height.
Step:3 Rotate your wrist so that your palm is facing inward, towards your body.
Step:4 Press the dumbbell up and away from your body, extending your arm fully.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

exercises.nameRu: Отведение назад с гантелями одной рукой
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in your right hand.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:3 Bring your right elbow up to your side, keeping it bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:4 Extend your right arm straight back, squeezing your triceps at the top of the movement.
Step:5 Slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
Step:1 Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in both hands with an overhand grip, and raise it above your head.
Step:3 Bend your elbows and lower the dumbbell behind your head, keeping your upper arms close to your ears.
Step:4 Extend your arms and raise the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a dumbbell in each hand.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and lean forward from your hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:3 Bring your upper arms close to your sides and keep your elbows bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:4 Extend your arms straight back, squeezing your triceps at the top of the movement.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell with both hands and extend your arms straight up towards the ceiling.
Step:3 Slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head, keeping your elbows close to your ears.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then raise the dumbbell back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameEn: ez bar french press on exercise ball
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball and hold an EZ barbell with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Extend your arms straight up, keeping your elbows close to your head.
Step:3 Slowly lower the barbell behind your head by bending your elbows.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameEn: dumbbell decline one arm hammer press
exercises.nameRu: Жим с гантелями на скамье с отриц. наклоном одной рукой
instructions: Step:1 Lie on a decline bench with a dumbbell in one hand, resting on your chest.
Step:2 Extend your arm straight up, keeping your elbow slightly bent.
Step:3 Lower the dumbbell down towards your shoulder, keeping your elbow close to your body.
Step:4 Press the dumbbell back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
Step:1 Attach a rope handle to a high pulley and kneel down facing the cable machine.
Step:2 Grasp the rope with a neutral grip (palms facing each other) and bring your hands to the sides of your head.
Step:3 Keep your elbows close to your head and your upper arms stationary throughout the exercise.
Step:4 Extend your forearms by contracting your triceps until your arms are fully extended.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then slowly return to the starting position by bending your elbows.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Position yourself between two parallel bars with your arms fully extended and your body suspended in the air.
Step:2 Bend your knees and cross your ankles.
Step:3 Lower your body by bending your elbows until your upper arms are parallel to the ground.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back against the pad.
Step:2 Grasp the handles or bars with an overhand grip, keeping your arms straight.
Step:3 Keeping your back straight, lift your shoulders up towards your ears as high as possible.
Step:4 Hold the contraction for a moment, then slowly lower your shoulders back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart and your arms extended in front of you.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:3 Lower your body by bending your elbows and retracting your shoulder blades, as if you are trying to squeeze a pencil between them.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your hands to extend your elbows and return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameRu: Шраги с гантелями на скамье с отриц. наклоном
instructions: Step:1 Set up a decline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Lie face down on the bench with your chest and stomach resting against it.
Step:3 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your arms fully extended towards the floor.
Step:4 Keeping your arms straight, raise your shoulders towards your ears as high as possible.
Step:5 Hold the contraction for a moment, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Stand with your feet wider than shoulder-width apart, toes pointing outwards.
Step:2 Hold a kettlebell with both hands in front of your body, arms extended downwards.
Step:3 Bend your knees and lower your hips into a squat position, keeping your back straight.
Step:4 Drive through your heels and explosively extend your hips and knees, pulling the kettlebell up towards your chin.
Step:5 As you pull the kettlebell up, keep your elbows high and wide, and squeeze your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Lower the kettlebell back down to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell in front of you with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Keep your arms straight and your back straight throughout the exercise.
Step:3 Lift your shoulders up towards your ears as high as possible, squeezing your traps at the top.
Step:4 Hold for a moment, then slowly lower your shoulders back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the leverage machine with your back against the pad.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and keep your arms straight.
Step:3 Keeping your back straight, lift your shoulders up towards your ears as high as possible.
Step:4 Hold the contraction for a moment, then slowly lower your shoulders back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your body.
Step:2 Keep your arms straight and let the dumbbells hang by your sides.
Step:3 Raise your shoulders as high as possible, as if you are trying to touch your ears with your shoulders.
Step:4 Hold the contraction for a second, then slowly lower your shoulders back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the leverage machine.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with your palms facing inwards and your arms fully extended.
Step:3 Keeping your back straight, exhale and elevate your shoulders as high as possible.
Step:4 Hold the contraction for a brief moment, then inhale and slowly lower your shoulders back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameRu: Шраги с гантелями на наклонной скамье
instructions: Step:1 Set an incline bench to a 45-degree angle and sit on it with a dumbbell in each hand.
Step:2 Place your feet flat on the ground and let your arms hang straight down with your palms facing your body.
Step:3 Keeping your arms straight, shrug your shoulders up towards your ears as high as possible.
Step:4 Hold the contraction for a moment, then slowly lower your shoulders back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameRu: Шраги с гантелями на скамье с отриц. наклоном
instructions: Step:1 Set up a decline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Lie face down on the bench with your chest and stomach resting on it.
Step:3 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing each other and your arms fully extended.
Step:4 Keeping your arms straight, raise your shoulders as high as possible while squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Hold the contraction for a brief pause, then lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Lie face down on the ground with your forearms flat on the floor, elbows directly under your shoulders.
Step:2 Engage your core and lift your chest off the ground, keeping your forearms and toes on the floor.
Step:3 Hold this position for a few seconds, making sure to keep your neck in a neutral position.
Step:4 Slowly lower your chest back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Place your hands on your hips or let them hang by your sides.
Step:3 Engage your core muscles and tilt your pelvis forward, pushing your lower back towards the wall behind you.
Step:4 Hold the position for a few seconds, then release and return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Start by sitting on the ground with your legs extended in front of you.
Step:2 Place the roller perpendicular to your body, just below your glutes.
Step:3 Slowly roll your body backwards, allowing the roller to move up your back.
Step:4 Continue rolling until the roller reaches your upper back.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then slowly roll back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Adjust the machine to fit your body size and range of motion.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your back against the pad and your feet secured.
Step:3 Place your hands on the handles or grip bars.
Step:4 Engage your core and slowly lean forward, allowing your back to round slightly.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom position, feeling a stretch in your lower back.
Step:6 Using your back muscles, slowly raise your torso back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your arms extended out to the sides.
Step:2 Bend forward at the waist, keeping your back straight and your knees slightly bent.
Step:3 Reach down towards your toes with both hands, keeping your legs straight.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Lie flat on your stomach with your legs extended and your arms by your sides.
Step:2 Engage your glutes and hamstrings, and slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling your back upwards.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Lie face down on the floor with your legs extended behind you.
Step:2 Place your hands on the floor next to your lower ribs, fingers pointing forward.
Step:3 Press your hands firmly into the floor and straighten your arms, lifting your torso and thighs off the ground.
Step:4 Roll your shoulders back and down, opening your chest and lifting your gaze towards the ceiling.
Step:5 Hold this position for a few breaths, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Sit on the stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold the stability ball with both hands, hugging it close to your chest.
Step:3 Engage your core muscles and slowly lean back, keeping your back straight and your feet planted on the ground.
Step:4 Continue leaning back until you feel a stretch in your back muscles.
Step:5 Hold the position for a few seconds, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Position yourself face down on a stability ball with your hips resting on the ball and your feet against a wall for stability.
Step:2 Place your hands behind your head or cross them over your chest.
Step:3 Engage your core and slowly lift your upper body off the ball, extending your back until your body forms a straight line.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameRu: Подъём в Смите на наклонной скамье
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the smith machine to an incline position.
Step:2 Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Keep your back straight and core engaged.
Step:5 Raise the barbell up towards the ceiling, leading with your elbows.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameRu: Подъём с гантелями на наклонной скамье
instructions: Step:1 Set an incline bench to a 45-degree angle and sit on it with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing down.
Step:2 Rest the dumbbells on your thighs and lean back onto the bench.
Step:3 Use your thighs to help raise the dumbbells to shoulder height, then rotate your wrists so that your palms are facing forward.
Step:4 Exhale and slowly raise the dumbbells above your head, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells back to shoulder height.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Place your hands on the bench slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Position your feet on the ground, hip-width apart.
Step:4 Lower your chest towards the bench, keeping your elbows tucked in.
Step:5 As you lower, retract your shoulder blades, squeezing your scapulae together.
Step:6 Push through your palms to extend your arms and return to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameRu: Подъём со штангой на наклонной скамье
instructions: Step:1 Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Sit on the bench with your back against the pad and feet flat on the ground.
Step:3 Hold a barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Lift the barbell up to shoulder height, keeping your elbows slightly bent.
Step:5 Slowly raise the barbell overhead, extending your arms fully.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back to shoulder height.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameRu: Растяжка в гравитроне лёжа лицом вниз
instructions: Step:1 Lie face down on the ground with your legs extended.
Step:2 Bend your left knee and reach back with your left hand to grab your left foot or ankle.
Step:3 Gently pull your left foot towards your glutes, feeling a stretch in your left quad.
Step:4 Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds, then release.
Step:5 Repeat with your right leg.
Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your arms by your sides.
Step:2 Begin by rapidly moving your feet up and down, as if you were running in place.
Step:3 Keep your movements quick and light, focusing on staying on the balls of your feet.
Step:4 Continue for the desired duration or number of repetitions.
Step:1 Stand in front of a step or platform with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your sides.
Step:2 Place your right foot on the step, ensuring your entire foot is on the surface.
Step:3 Push through your right heel and lift your body up onto the step, bringing your left foot up as well.
Step:4 Once both feet are on the step, lower your left foot back down to the starting position, keeping your right foot on the step.
Step:5 Repeat the movement, alternating which foot you step up with each time.
Step:6 Continue for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Attach the resistance band to a sturdy anchor point and secure it around your ankle.
Step:2 Stand facing the anchor point with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Keeping your core engaged and your upper body stable, extend your leg straight out in front of you.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly return your leg to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs.
Step:1 Adjust the seat height and backrest of the machine to fit your body.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your back against the backrest and your feet on the footpad.
Step:3 Grasp the handles or sidebars for stability.
Step:4 Extend your legs forward by straightening your knees, lifting the weight.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the weight back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameRu: Жим ногами в рычажном тренажёре попеременные
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat and foot platform of the leverage machine to your desired position.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your back against the backrest and your feet on the foot platform.
Step:3 Place your hands on the handles or sides of the machine for stability.
Step:4 Push one foot against the foot platform, extending your leg until it is almost fully straight.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then slowly bend your leg and return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat with the other leg.
Step:7 Continue alternating legs for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Lower your body by bending your knees and pushing your hips back as if sitting on a chair.
Step:3 Keep your chest up and your back straight.
Step:4 Lower yourself until your thighs are parallel to the ground.
Step:5 Push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameRu: Разведение на фитболе на наклонной скамье
instructions: Step:1 Set up a stability ball at an incline angle.
Step:2 Attach the cable handles to the high pulleys of a cable machine.
Step:3 Sit on the stability ball facing away from the machine, with your feet firmly planted on the ground.
Step:4 Grasp the cable handles with an overhand grip, palms facing forward.
Step:5 Lean forward slightly, keeping your back straight and core engaged.
Step:6 With a controlled motion, bring your arms out to the sides, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:7 Continue the motion until your arms are parallel to the ground.
Step:8 Pause for a moment, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:9 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameRu: Жим от груди в рычажном тренажёре (базовый)
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back flat against the pad.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and position your elbows at a 90-degree angle.
Step:3 Push the handles forward until your arms are fully extended, exhaling during the movement.
Step:4 Pause briefly at the end of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position, inhaling as you do so.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
exercises._original_nameRu: Жим от груди в рычажном тренажёре

instructions: Step:1 Stand in the middle of a cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Hold the handles of the cables with your palms facing down and your arms extended straight out to the sides.
Step:3 Keeping your arms straight, bring your hands together in front of your body, crossing them over each other.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then slowly return to the starting position, keeping your arms extended.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Adjust the machine to your desired height and secure your knees on the pad.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with a wide grip and keep your elbows slightly bent.
Step:3 Lower your body by bending your elbows until your upper arms are parallel to the floor.
Step:4 Push yourself back up to the starting position by extending your arms.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Grab the parallel bars with your palms facing down and your arms fully extended.
Step:2 Bend your knees and cross your ankles.
Step:3 Lower your body by bending your arms until your shoulders are below your elbows.
Step:4 Push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an overhand grip, palms facing down.
Step:2 Keep your arms straight and raise the barbell in front of you until it reaches shoulder height.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Step:4 Next, lower the barbell behind your head, keeping your arms straight.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then raise the barbell back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameEn: dumbbell one arm decline chest press
exercises.nameRu: Жим с гантелями на скамье с отриц. наклоном одной рукой
instructions: Step:1 Lie on a decline bench with a dumbbell in one hand, resting on your chest.
Step:2 Place your feet flat on the ground and keep your back pressed against the bench.
Step:3 Extend your arm and push the dumbbell up towards the ceiling, fully extending your elbow.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
Step:1 Attach cables to both sides of a cable machine at chest height.
Step:2 Stand in the center of the machine with one foot slightly in front of the other.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and extend your arms out to the sides.
Step:4 Keep a slight bend in your elbows and maintain a slight forward lean.
Step:5 Engage your chest muscles and bring your arms forward in a sweeping motion.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the center, then slowly return your arms back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Adjust the machine to your desired height and secure your knees on the pad.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with your palms facing down and your arms fully extended.
Step:3 Lower your body by bending your elbows until your upper arms are parallel to the floor.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then push yourself back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back flat against the pad.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and position your elbows at a 90-degree angle.
Step:3 Push the handles forward until your arms are fully extended, exhaling during the movement.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position, inhaling as you do so.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Start in a push-up position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your body in a straight line.
Step:2 Lower your chest towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping your body straight.
Step:3 Push through your palms to extend your arms and return to the starting position.
Step:4 From the push-up position, pull your chest towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping your body straight.
Step:5 Push through your palms to extend your arms and return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameRu: Пуловер со штангой на скамье с отриц. наклоном
instructions: Step:1 Lie down on a decline bench with your head lower than your hips and your feet secured.
Step:2 Hold the barbell with a pronated grip (palms facing away from you) and your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Extend your arms above your chest, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:4 Lower the barbell in an arc motion behind your head, feeling a stretch in your chest and shoulders.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then return the barbell to the starting position by reversing the motion.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Lie down on the bench with your feet flat on the ground.
Step:3 Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows at a 45-degree angle.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the barbell back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameEn: wide-grip chest dip on high parallel bars
instructions: Step:1 Position yourself on the parallel bars with your arms fully extended and your body suspended in the air.
Step:2 Lean forward slightly and lower your body by bending your elbows until your chest is just above the bars.
Step:3 Pause for a moment, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Start in a high plank position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your feet together.
Step:2 Lower your chest towards the ground, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:3 Once your chest is just above the ground, explosively push yourself up, lifting your hands off the ground.
Step:4 As you push up, quickly move your hands out to the sides and slightly forward, allowing your body to drop down towards the ground.
Step:5 Catch yourself with your hands in the wider position and immediately lower your chest towards the ground again.
Step:6 Repeat the push-up motion, dropping down and catching yourself with your hands in the narrower position.
Step:7 Continue alternating between the wider and narrower hand positions for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Start in a push-up position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your feet together.
Step:2 Extend one arm straight out to the side, parallel to the ground.
Step:3 Lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping your back straight and core engaged.
Step:4 Push back up to the starting position, using your chest muscles to lift your body.
Step:5 Repeat with the other arm extended.

exercises.nameEn: barbell reverse grip incline bench press
exercises.nameRu: Жим лёжа со штангой обратным хватом на наклонной скамье
instructions: Step:1 Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Lie down on the bench with your feet flat on the ground.
Step:3 Grasp the barbell with a reverse grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in.
Step:5 Pause for a moment when the barbell touches your chest.
Step:6 Push the barbell back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Start in a high plank position with your hands on the kettlebells, shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Lower your chest towards the ground, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:3 Push through your hands explosively, lifting your hands off the kettlebells and extending your arms fully.
Step:4 Land softly back on the kettlebells and immediately lower your chest back down for the next repetition.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Start in a push-up position with your hands shoulder-width apart and one hand placed slightly wider than the other.
Step:2 Engage your core and lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping your back straight.
Step:3 As you lower yourself, shift your weight to one side and lift the opposite arm off the ground, extending it straight out to the side.
Step:4 Push through your chest and triceps to raise your body back up to the starting position, while simultaneously lowering your extended arm back to the ground.
Step:5 Repeat the movement, alternating the arm you extend with each repetition.

exercises.nameRu: Жим со штангой на скамье с отриц. наклоном
instructions: Step:1 Lie on a decline bench with your feet secured and your head lower than your hips.
Step:2 Grasp the barbell with a wide grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Lower the barbell to your chest, keeping your elbows out to the sides.
Step:4 Push the barbell back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed against the bench.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand, with your palms facing forward and your arms extended above your chest.
Step:3 Lower the dumbbells slowly to the sides of your chest, keeping your elbows at a 90-degree angle.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then push the dumbbells back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameEn: dumbbell lying one arm press v. 2
exercises.nameRu: Жим с гантелями одной рукой лёжа
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your back supported and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in one hand with your palm facing towards your feet.
Step:3 Extend your arm straight up towards the ceiling, keeping your elbow slightly bent.
Step:4 Slowly lower the dumbbell down towards your chest, keeping your elbow close to your body.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the dumbbell back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.

exercises.nameRu: Жим на блоке на скамье с отриц. наклоном одной рукой
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the cable machine to a decline position.
Step:2 Stand facing away from the machine and grab the handle with one hand.
Step:3 Position yourself with your back against the decline bench and your arm extended straight in front of you.
Step:4 Bend your elbow and lower the handle towards your chest while keeping your upper arm stationary.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the handle back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

exercises.nameRu: Жим в рычажном тренажёре на наклонной скамье
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and backrest angle on the leverage machine to a comfortable position.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your back against the backrest and your feet flat on the floor.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and position your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Push the handles forward and away from your body until your arms are fully extended, but without locking your elbows.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the fully extended position, then slowly bend your elbows and lower the handles back towards your chest.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameRu: Разведение на блоке на скамье с отриц. наклоном
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the cable machine to a decline position.
Step:2 Stand facing away from the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Hold the handles with your palms facing forward and your arms extended straight out in front of you.
Step:4 Keeping a slight bend in your elbows, open your arms out to the sides in a controlled motion.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the fully extended position, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameEn: barbell reverse grip decline bench press
exercises.nameRu: Жим лёжа со штангой обратным хватом на скамье с отриц. наклоном
instructions: Step:1 Lie on a decline bench with your feet secured and your head lower than your hips.
Step:2 Grasp the barbell with a reverse grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the barbell back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameEn: barbell wide reverse grip bench press
exercises.nameRu: Жим лёжа со штангой обратным хватом
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed against the bench.
Step:2 Grasp the barbell with a wide reverse grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Lift the barbell off the rack and hold it directly above your chest with your arms fully extended.
Step:4 Lower the barbell slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in and your wrists straight.
Step:5 Pause for a moment when the barbell touches your chest, then push it back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameEn: dumbbell one arm fly on exercise ball
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with a dumbbell in one hand and your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Walk your feet forward and roll your body down until your upper back is resting on the exercise ball.
Step:3 Extend your arm with the dumbbell straight up above your chest, palm facing inwards.
Step:4 Slowly lower the dumbbell out to the side, keeping a slight bend in your elbow.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then squeeze your chest muscles to bring the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

exercises.nameRu: Жим от груди в рычажном тренажёре (нейтральный хват)
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back flat against the pad.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and position your elbows at a 90-degree angle.
Step:3 Push the handles forward until your arms are fully extended, exhaling during the movement.
Step:4 Pause briefly at the end of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position, inhaling as you do so.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
exercises._original_nameRu: Жим от груди в рычажном тренажёре

instructions: Step:1 Position yourself on parallel bars with your arms fully extended and your body straight.
Step:2 Lower your body by bending your elbows until your shoulders are below your elbows.
Step:3 Push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a weight plate in front of your chest with both hands.
Step:2 Keep your elbows slightly bent and your palms facing each other.
Step:3 Press the weight plate straight out in front of you, fully extending your arms.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, then slowly bring the weight plate back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameRu: Жим с гантелями на наклонной скамье одной рукой
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an incline bench with a dumbbell in one hand, resting on your thigh.
Step:2 Lie back on the bench and position the dumbbell at shoulder level, palm facing forward.
Step:3 Press the dumbbell upward and slightly inward, extending your arm fully.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
Step:1 Place the stability ball on the ground and position yourself facing down with your hands on the ball, shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Extend your legs straight out behind you, balancing on your toes.
Step:3 Engage your core and lower your chest towards the ball by bending your elbows, keeping your body in a straight line.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Position yourself between two parallel bars with your arms extended and supporting your body weight.
Step:2 Lower your body by bending your elbows until your upper arms are parallel to the ground.
Step:3 Pause for a moment, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your head at one end and your feet on the floor.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell with both hands and extend your arms straight above your chest.
Step:3 Keeping a slight bend in your elbows, slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head until you feel a stretch in your chest and shoulders.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then raise the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Adjust the dip bars to a height that allows you to comfortably grip them.
Step:2 Stand between the bars and place your hands on each bar, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Jump up and straighten your arms, supporting your body weight on the bars.
Step:4 Bend your knees and cross your ankles behind you.
Step:5 Lower your body by bending your elbows, keeping your chest up and your shoulders down.
Step:6 Continue lowering until your shoulders are below your elbows or until you feel a stretch in your chest.
Step:7 Push through your palms and extend your elbows to raise your body back up to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameEn: dumbbell one arm incline chest press
exercises.nameRu: Жим с гантелями на наклонной скамье одной рукой
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the incline bench to a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Sit on the bench with your back against the pad and feet flat on the ground.
Step:3 Hold a dumbbell in one hand with an overhand grip, resting it on your shoulder.
Step:4 Push the dumbbell up and away from your body, extending your arm fully.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.

exercises.nameRu: Жим с гантелями попеременные на наклонной скамье
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an incline bench with a dumbbell in each hand, resting on your thighs.
Step:2 Lean back on the bench and use your thighs to help raise the dumbbells to shoulder height, palms facing forward.
Step:3 Once at shoulder height, rotate your wrists so that the palms of your hands are facing forward.
Step:4 Push the dumbbells up with your chest and shoulders, extending your arms fully.
Step:5 Lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position, keeping your elbows slightly bent.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, alternating arms.

exercises.nameEn: assisted seated pectoralis major stretch with stability ball
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold a stability ball with both hands and extend your arms straight out in front of you.
Step:3 Slowly lower the stability ball towards your chest, feeling a stretch in your pectoral muscles.
Step:4 Hold the stretch for a few seconds, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Place the bosu ball on the ground with the flat side facing up.
Step:2 Position yourself in a push-up position with your hands on the outer edges of the bosu ball.
Step:3 Engage your core and lower your body down towards the bosu ball by bending your elbows.
Step:4 Push yourself back up to the starting position by extending your arms.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Start by lying on your back on the floor with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a kettlebell in each hand, with your palms facing towards your feet and your arms extended straight up towards the ceiling.
Step:3 Lower one kettlebell down towards your shoulder while keeping the other kettlebell extended straight up.
Step:4 Press the lowered kettlebell back up to the starting position while simultaneously lowering the other kettlebell down towards your shoulder.
Step:5 Continue alternating the press motion with each kettlebell for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameRu: Жим на блоке на скамье с отриц. наклоном
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the cable machine to a decline position.
Step:2 Sit on the decline bench facing the cable machine.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and position them at chest level.
Step:4 Keep your feet flat on the ground and your back firmly against the bench.
Step:5 Exhale and push the handles away from your body, extending your arms fully.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, squeezing your chest muscles.
Step:7 Inhale and slowly return the handles back to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameEn: kettlebell extended range one arm press on floor
instructions: Step:1 Start by lying on your back on the floor with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a kettlebell in one hand, with your palm facing towards your feet.
Step:3 Extend your arm straight up towards the ceiling, keeping your elbow locked and your wrist straight.
Step:4 Slowly lower the kettlebell back down to the starting position, maintaining control throughout the movement.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.

exercises.nameEn: dumbbell incline one arm fly on exercise ball
exercises.nameRu: Разведение с гантелями на наклонной скамье одной рукой
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with a dumbbell in one hand.
Step:2 Walk your feet forward and roll your body down until your head, neck, and upper back are supported on the ball.
Step:3 Hold the dumbbell with your arm extended straight up over your chest, palm facing inwards.
Step:4 Slowly lower the dumbbell out to the side, keeping a slight bend in your elbow.
Step:5 Pause for a moment when your arm is parallel to the ground.
Step:6 Engage your chest muscles to bring the dumbbell back up to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

exercises.nameEn: cable one arm decline chest fly
exercises.nameRu: Разведение на блоке на скамье с отриц. наклоном одной рукой
instructions: Step:1 Attach a D-handle to a low pulley cable machine and set the bench to a decline angle.
Step:2 Lie down on the bench with your head towards the machine and grab the handle with your right hand.
Step:3 Extend your arm straight up above your chest, keeping a slight bend in your elbow.
Step:4 With a controlled motion, lower your arm out to the side until your hand is in line with your shoulder.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then reverse the motion and bring your arm back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to your left arm and repeat the exercise.

exercises.nameRu: Жим на блоке на наклонной скамье одной рукой
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the cable machine to a low pulley position.
Step:2 Sit on an incline bench facing away from the cable machine.
Step:3 Grasp the handle with one hand and bring it up to shoulder height.
Step:4 Position your feet firmly on the ground and maintain a stable position.
Step:5 Press the handle forward and upward, extending your arm fully.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the handle back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

exercises.nameEn: dumbbell incline one arm press on exercise ball
exercises.nameRu: Жим с гантелями на наклонной скамье одной рукой
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with a dumbbell in one hand, feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Slowly walk your feet forward, rolling the ball until your head, neck, and upper back are supported on the ball.
Step:3 Hold the dumbbell at shoulder height with your palm facing forward.
Step:4 Press the dumbbell upward until your arm is fully extended.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed against the bench.
Step:2 Grasp the barbell with a wide grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.

Step:4 Lower the barbell slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows slightly flared out.

exercises.nameRu: Разведение с гантелями на скамье с отриц. наклоном

Step:4 Pause for a moment, then squeeze your chest muscles to bring the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

Step:3 Lower your chest towards the box by bending your elbows, keeping your body in a straight line.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms.

Step:2 Grasp the handles with a pronated grip and keep your elbows slightly bent.

Step:4 Pause for a moment, squeezing your chest muscles.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly return to the starting position, allowing your chest muscles to stretch.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameRu: Жим гантелей на наклонной скамье хват-молот
instructions: Step:1 Set an incline bench to a 45-degree angle and sit on it with a dumbbell in each hand, resting on your thighs.

Step:3 Press the dumbbells up and away from your body until your arms are fully extended.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.

exercises.nameEn: cable one arm incline press on exercise ball
exercises.nameRu: Жим на блоке на наклонной скамье одной рукой
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back resting against an incline bench.
Step:2 Hold a cable handle in one hand and position your arm at a 90-degree angle with your elbow bent.
Step:3 Press the cable handle forward and upward, extending your arm fully.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the cable handle back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
Step:1 Attach the handles to the cables at chest height.
Step:2 Stand in the center of the cable machine with one foot slightly in front of the other.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with your palms facing down and your arms extended out to the sides.
Step:4 Keep a slight bend in your elbows and engage your core.
Step:5 Pull the cables together in front of your chest, crossing them over each other.
Step:6 Squeeze your chest muscles at the peak of the movement.
Step:7 Slowly release the cables back to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Attach the handles to the cables at chest height.
Step:2 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, facing away from the cable machine.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, palms facing forward.
Step:4 Step forward slightly to create tension in the cables.
Step:5 Keep your core engaged and your back straight throughout the exercise.
Step:6 With a slight bend in your elbows, slowly bring your arms forward and together in front of your chest.
Step:7 Squeeze your chest muscles at the peak of the movement.
Step:8 Slowly reverse the movement, returning your arms to the starting position.
Step:9 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameRu: Жим лёжа в Смите широким хватом
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the bench to a comfortable position on the smith machine.
Step:2 Lie down on the bench with your feet flat on the ground.
Step:3 Grasp the barbell with a wide grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows out to the sides.
Step:5 Pause for a moment when the barbell touches your chest.
Step:6 Push the barbell back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameRu: Жим в Смите на наклонной скамье
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat of the smith machine to a comfortable incline angle.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your back against the pad and your feet flat on the ground.
Step:3 Grasp the bar with an overhand grip that is slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Unrack the bar and lower it slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in.
Step:5 Pause for a moment when the bar is just above your chest.
Step:6 Push the bar back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameEn: cable one arm press on exercise ball
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold a cable handle in one hand and position your arm at chest height, elbow bent.
Step:3 Place your other hand on your hip for stability.
Step:4 Press the cable handle forward, extending your arm fully.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

exercises.nameRu: Жим в Смите на скамье с отриц. наклоном
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the smith machine to a decline position.
Step:2 Lie down on the bench with your feet secured under the foot pads.
Step:3 Grasp the barbell with a reverse grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Unrack the barbell and lower it towards your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the barbell back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Set an incline bench to a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Sit on the bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other.
Step:3 Lie back on the bench and press the dumbbells up to the starting position, directly above your chest.
Step:4 Lower the dumbbells out to the sides in a wide arc until you feel a stretch in your chest.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then squeeze your chest muscles to bring the dumbbells back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameEn: dumbbell one arm chest fly on exercise ball
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with a dumbbell in one hand and your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Walk your feet forward, rolling the ball until your upper back is supported on the ball and your head, neck, and shoulders are off the ball.
Step:3 Extend your arm with the dumbbell straight up above your chest, palm facing inward.
Step:4 Slowly lower the dumbbell out to the side, keeping a slight bend in your elbow.
Step:5 Pause for a moment when your arm is parallel to the ground.
Step:6 Engage your chest muscles to bring the dumbbell back up to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other.
Step:2 Extend your arms straight up over your chest, with a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:3 Keeping a slight bend in your elbows, lower the dumbbells out to the sides in a wide arc until you feel a stretch in your chest.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then reverse the movement and bring the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameEn: smith machine reverse decline close grip bench press
exercises.nameRu: Жим лёжа в Смите узким хватом на скамье с отриц. наклоном
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the smith machine to a decline position.
Step:2 Lie down on the bench with your feet secured under the foot pads.
Step:3 Grasp the barbell with a close grip, slightly narrower than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the barbell back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your head at one end and your feet planted firmly on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell with both hands and extend your arms straight above your chest.
Step:3 Keeping your arms straight, slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head in an arc-like motion.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then raise the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameRu: Жим штанги на скамье с отрицательным наклоном
instructions: Step:1 Lie on a decline bench with your feet secured and your head lower than your hips.
Step:2 Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the barbell back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameEn: cable one arm fly on exercise ball
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold a cable handle in one hand and extend your arm out to the side, parallel to the ground.
Step:3 Keep your elbow slightly bent and your palm facing forward.
Step:4 Slowly bring your arm across your body, squeezing your chest muscles.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other and arms extended straight up.
Step:2 Lower the dumbbells to the sides of your chest, keeping your elbows at a 90-degree angle.
Step:3 Press the dumbbells back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameRu: Жим в рычажном тренажёре на наклонной скамье
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat and backrest of the leverage machine to a comfortable position.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your back against the backrest and your feet flat on the floor.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and position your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Push the handles forward and away from your body until your arms are fully extended.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then slowly bend your elbows and lower the handles back towards your chest.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
