Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball and hold a dumbbell with both hands above your chest, arms extended.
Step:2 Slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head while keeping your arms straight.
Step:3 Pause for a moment, then raise the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Sit on the bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed firmly against the bench.
Step:3 Hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward, and lift them to shoulder height.
Step:4 Slowly lower the dumbbells to the sides of your chest, keeping your elbows at a 90-degree angle.
Step:5 Push the dumbbells back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameRu: Жим в рычажном тренажёре на скамье с отриц. наклоном
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and backrest of the leverage machine to a comfortable position.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your back against the backrest and your feet flat on the floor.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and position your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Push the handles forward and away from your body until your arms are fully extended.
Step:5 Slowly lower the handles back towards your chest, keeping your elbows slightly bent.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the handles back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip, palms facing towards your feet.
Step:3 Extend your arms straight up towards the ceiling, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:4 Slowly lower the dumbbells towards your chest, allowing your elbows to flare out to the sides.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the dumbbells back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameRu: Разведение с гантелями на скамье с отриц. наклоном одной рукой
instructions: Step:1 Lie down on a decline bench with a dumbbell in one hand, resting it on your thigh.
Step:2 Using your thigh to help raise the dumbbell, lift it up to shoulder width with your palm facing your torso.
Step:3 Rotate your wrist so that the palm of your hand is facing forward.
Step:4 As you breathe in, lower the dumbbell slowly to the side until you feel a stretch in your chest.
Step:5 Exhale and use your chest muscles to bring the dumbbell back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

exercises.nameEn: dumbbell one leg fly on exercise ball
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other.
Step:2 Place one foot on the ground and extend the other leg straight out in front of you.
Step:3 Lean forward slightly and bring your arms out to the sides, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:4 Slowly lower the dumbbells down and out to the sides, feeling a stretch in your chest.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then squeeze your chest muscles to bring the dumbbells back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs and repeat.
Step:1 Attach the handles to the cables and lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold the handles with your palms facing each other and your arms extended straight above your chest.
Step:3 Keeping a slight bend in your elbows, lower your arms out to the sides in a wide arc until you feel a stretch in your chest.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then squeeze your chest muscles to bring your arms back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameEn: dumbbell one arm pullover on exercise ball
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell with one hand and extend your arm straight up above your chest.
Step:3 Slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head while keeping your arm straight.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then raise the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
Step:1 Sit on a flat bench with a dumbbell in one hand, resting it on top of your thigh.
Step:2 Lie back on the bench, keeping the dumbbell pressed against your thigh.
Step:3 Using your free hand, help lift the dumbbell up to the starting position.
Step:4 Hold the dumbbell directly above your shoulder with your arm extended and palm facing inward.
Step:5 Lower the dumbbell out to the side in a wide arc, keeping a slight bend in your elbow.
Step:6 Pause when your arm is parallel to the ground, then reverse the movement and bring the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms and repeat.
Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and dumbbells in each hand, resting on your thighs.
Step:2 Slowly walk your feet forward, rolling the exercise ball until your lower back is supported on the ball and your knees are at a 90-degree angle.
Step:3 Raise the dumbbells to shoulder height, palms facing forward.
Step:4 Press the dumbbells upward until your arms are fully extended.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Stand facing a wall with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Extend one arm straight out in front of you and place your palm against the wall.
Step:3 Engage your core and lean your body forward, keeping your arm straight and your back flat.
Step:4 Slowly push against the wall with your palm, activating your lat muscles.
Step:5 Hold the position for a few seconds, then release and repeat with the other arm.

exercises.nameRu: Тяга сверху в рычажном тренажёре (широкий хват)
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your knees under the pads and your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Sit upright with your chest lifted and your shoulders back, maintaining a slight arch in your lower back.
Step:4 Engage your lats and pull the handles down towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly release the handles back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Grasp a pull-up bar with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Hang from the bar with your arms fully extended and your body relaxed.
Step:4 Pull yourself up by bending your elbows and bringing your chin towards the bar, while keeping your body straight.
Step:5 Once your chin is above the bar, lower yourself back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Attach the band to a pull-up bar or sturdy anchor point.
Step:2 Step onto the band and grip the bar with your palms facing away from you, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Hang with your arms fully extended, keeping your core engaged and your shoulders down and back.
Step:4 Pull your body up towards the bar by squeezing your shoulder blades together and driving your elbows down towards your hips.
Step:5 Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar, then slowly lower yourself back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameRu: Тяга сверху в тренажёре обратным хватом
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your knees under the pads and your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an underhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Sit upright with your chest out and shoulders back, maintaining a slight arch in your lower back.
Step:4 Pull the handles down towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly release the handles back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
exercises._original_nameRu: Тяга сверху в тренажёре обратным хватом

exercises.nameEn: cable lying extension pullover (with rope attachment)
instructions: Step:1 Attach a rope to a cable machine and set the pulley at the highest position.
Step:2 Lie down on a bench with your head towards the cable machine.
Step:3 Hold the rope with both hands and extend your arms straight up above your chest.
Step:4 Keeping your arms straight, slowly lower the rope behind your head while maintaining control.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly raise the rope back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Adjust the seat height so that your thighs are parallel to the ground and your feet are flat on the floor.
Step:2 Grasp the lat bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Sit down and lean back slightly, keeping your chest up and your back straight.
Step:4 Pull the bar down towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly release the bar back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Attach a straight bar to the high pulley of a cable machine.
Step:2 Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, keeping your arms straight and your palms facing down.
Step:4 Engage your lats and pull the bar down towards your thighs, keeping your arms straight throughout the movement.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly return the bar to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Attach the band to a high anchor point, such as a pull-up bar or sturdy beam.
Step:2 Stand facing the anchor point and grab the band with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Step back to create tension in the band, keeping your feet hip-width apart.
Step:4 Engage your core and keep your back straight as you pull the band down towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly release the band back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Stand facing a pull-up bar with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Reach up and grab the bar with an underhand grip, with one hand gripping the bar and the other hand holding your wrist for support.
Step:3 Hang from the bar with your arm fully extended, keeping your body straight and your core engaged.
Step:4 Pull yourself up towards the bar by bending your elbow and squeezing your back muscles.
Step:5 Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar, then slowly lower yourself back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms and repeat.

exercises.nameRu: Подтягивание обр. хватом в гравитроне стоя
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the machine to your desired assistance level.
Step:2 Stand on the foot platform and grip the handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Keep your chest up and shoulders back, engage your core, and slightly bend your knees.
Step:4 Pull your body up by flexing your elbows and driving your elbows down towards your sides.
Step:5 Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your head at one end and your feet on the floor.
Step:2 Hold a barbell with a shoulder-width grip and extend your arms straight above your chest.
Step:3 Keeping your arms straight, lower the barbell behind your head in a controlled manner until you feel a stretch in your lats.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then raise the barbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameEn: medicine ball catch and overhead throw
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a medicine ball in both hands at chest level.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and engage your core.
Step:3 Lower your body into a squat position, keeping your back straight and chest up.
Step:4 Explosively extend your hips and legs, while simultaneously throwing the medicine ball overhead.
Step:5 Release the ball at the top of the movement and catch it on the way down.
Step:6 Lower your body back into the squat position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Hang from a pull-up bar with your palms facing towards you and your hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Engage your core and pull your body up towards the bar, leading with your chest.
Step:3 Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameRu: Тяга сверху на блоке одной рукой
instructions: Step:1 Attach a single handle to a high pulley cable machine.
Step:2 Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the handle with an overhand grip and extend your arm fully.
Step:4 Keep your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:5 Pull the handle down towards your side while keeping your elbow close to your body.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, squeezing your lat muscle.
Step:7 Slowly release the handle back to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:9 Switch sides and repeat the exercise with the other arm.
Step:1 Grab the pull-up bar with a wide overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Hang from the bar with your arms fully extended and your body straight.
Step:3 Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the bar, leading with your chest.
Step:4 Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameEn: band fixed back close grip pulldown
exercises.nameRu: Тяга сверху с лентой узким хватом
instructions: Step:1 Attach the band to a fixed point above you, such as a pull-up bar or sturdy beam.
Step:2 Sit down on a bench or chair facing the band, with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent.
Step:3 Grasp the band with a close grip, palms facing towards you.
Step:4 Keep your back straight and engage your core.
Step:5 Pull the band down towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, feeling the contraction in your lats.
Step:7 Slowly release the band back to the starting position, maintaining control throughout the movement.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameRu: Тяга сверху в рычажном тренажёре обратным хватом
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your knees under the pads and your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Sit upright with your chest out and shoulders back, maintaining a slight arch in your lower back.
Step:4 Pull the handles down towards your chest, leading with your elbows and squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly release the handles back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
exercises._original_nameRu: Тяга сверху в рычажном тренажёре обратным хватом

instructions: Step:1 Hang from a pull-up bar with your palms facing away from you and your hands wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Engage your core and squeeze your shoulder blades together.
Step:3 Pull your body up towards the bar until your chin is above the bar.
Step:4 Lower your body back down to the starting position with control.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Adjust the machine to your desired weight and height settings.
Step:2 Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Engage your lats and biceps, and pull yourself up towards the handles.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your back muscles.
Step:6 Slowly lower yourself back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Adjust the cable machine so that the pulldown bar is at a height above your head.
Step:2 Sit down on the seat and grab the pulldown bar with an underhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and lean back slightly.
Step:4 Pull the bar down towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly release the bar back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameRu: Пуловер со штангой на скамье с отриц. наклоном
instructions: Step:1 Lie down on a decline bench with your head lower than your hips and your feet secured.
Step:2 Hold a barbell with a pronated grip (palms facing away from you) and extend your arms straight above your chest.
Step:3 Lower the barbell behind your head in a controlled manner, keeping your arms slightly bent.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then raise the barbell back to the starting position by contracting your lats.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameEn: ez bar lying bent arms pullover
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your head at one end and your feet on the floor.
Step:2 Hold the EZ barbell with a pronated grip (palms facing away from you) and your hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Extend your arms straight above your chest, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:4 Lower the barbell in an arc motion behind your head, maintaining the slight bend in your elbows.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then return the barbell to the starting position by reversing the arc motion.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Adjust the seat and handles of the leverage machine to a comfortable position.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your back against the pad and grasp the handles with an overhand grip.
Step:3 Keep your arms slightly bent and your core engaged.
Step:4 Slowly pull the handles towards your chest, squeezing your lats.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the peak contraction, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your head at one end and your feet on the floor.
Step:2 Hold a barbell with a shoulder-width grip and extend your arms straight above your chest.
Step:3 Lower the barbell behind your head while keeping your arms slightly bent.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then raise the barbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Adjust the machine to your desired weight and height settings.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Hang with your arms fully extended and your feet off the ground.
Step:4 Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the handles, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:5 Continue pulling until your chin is above the handles.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Stand facing a high bar with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Reach up and grab the bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Hang from the bar with your arms fully extended and your body straight.
Step:4 Engage your lats and biceps to pull your chest up towards the bar, leading with your sternum.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower yourself back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameRu: Тяга верхнего блока к задней части шеи
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the cable machine so that the pulley is at the highest position.
Step:2 Sit facing the machine with your feet flat on the ground and your knees slightly bent.
Step:3 Grasp the cable attachment with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Lean back slightly, keeping your back straight and your chest up.
Step:5 Pull the cable attachment down towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly release the cable back up to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameRu: Разгибание на блоке на блоке на наклонной скамье
instructions: Step:1 Attach a straight bar to a high pulley cable machine.
Step:2 Stand facing away from the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Lean forward slightly and keep your back straight.
Step:5 Pull the bar down towards your thighs by extending your elbows.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly return the bar to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Grab the pull-up bar with an underhand grip (palms facing towards you) and your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Hang from the bar with your arms fully extended and your feet off the ground.
Step:3 Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the bar, leading with your chest.
Step:4 Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position with control.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Attach a rope attachment to the cable machine at a high position.
Step:2 Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the rope with an overhand grip, palms facing each other.
Step:4 Keep your back straight and lean slightly back.
Step:5 Pull the rope down towards your sides, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement.
Step:7 Slowly release the tension and allow the rope to return to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Sit on the cable machine with your feet flat on the floor and your knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Grasp the v-bar attachment with an overhand grip, palms facing each other, and your hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and lean slightly forward from the hips.
Step:4 Pull the v-bar towards your torso by retracting your shoulder blades and squeezing your back muscles.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the peak of the contraction, then slowly release the tension and return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameEn: weighted close grip chin-up on dip cage
exercises.nameRu: Подтягивание обр. хватом с отягощением узким хватом
instructions: Step:1 Stand in front of the dip cage and grab the parallel bars with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Hang from the bars with your arms fully extended, feet off the ground, and body straight.
Step:3 Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the bars, keeping your elbows close to your sides.
Step:4 Continue pulling until your chin is above the bars, then pause for a moment.
Step:5 Slowly lower your body back down to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Start by hanging from a vertical bar with your palms facing away from you and your arms fully extended.
Step:2 Engage your core and pull your body up towards the bar, leading with your chest.
Step:3 As you pull yourself up, lean back slightly and bring your elbows towards your sides.
Step:4 Continue pulling until your chest reaches the bar and your elbows are fully bent.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower yourself back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Grab the pull-up bar with your palms facing towards you and your hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Hang from the bar with your arms fully extended and your feet off the ground.
Step:3 Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the bar, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:4 Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your head at one end and your feet on the ground.
Step:2 Hold the barbell with a pronated grip (palms facing away from you) and extend your arms straight above your chest.
Step:3 Keeping your arms straight, lower the barbell behind your head in an arc-like motion until you feel a stretch in your lats.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then reverse the motion and press the barbell back to the starting position above your chest.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Attach a cable handle to each side of a cable machine at shoulder height.
Step:2 Stand in the middle of the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and step back to create tension in the cables.
Step:4 Lean forward slightly from the hips, keeping your back straight and your chest up.
Step:5 Pull the handles down and across your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Attach the band to a high anchor point, such as a pull-up bar or sturdy beam.
Step:2 Stand facing the anchor point with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the band with an underhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Extend your arms fully overhead, keeping your elbows slightly bent.
Step:5 Engage your lats and pull the band down towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly release the tension and return to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Sit on the cable machine with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Lean back slightly and pull the handles towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement, then slowly release the handles back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the roller with both hands in front of your body.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:3 Extend your arms forward and roll the roller down towards your feet, feeling a stretch in your lats.
Step:4 Hold the stretch for a few seconds, then slowly roll the roller back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Attach the band to a sturdy anchor point above your head.
Step:2 Stand facing the anchor point with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the band with an underhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Step back to create tension in the band, keeping your arms fully extended.
Step:5 Engage your core and squeeze your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Pull the band down towards your chest, leading with your elbows.
Step:7 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, feeling the contraction in your lats.
Step:8 Slowly release the tension in the band and return to the starting position.
Step:9 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameEn: cable lat pulldown full range of motion
exercises.nameRu: Тяга верхнего блока с полной амплитудой
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the lat pulldown machine with your knees positioned under the pads.
Step:2 Grasp the cable bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Lean back slightly and keep your chest up, maintaining a slight arch in your lower back.
Step:4 Pull the bar down towards your upper chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly release the bar back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Grab the pull-up bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Hang from the bar with your arms fully extended and your body straight.
Step:3 Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the bar, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:4 Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameEn: cable wide grip rear pulldown behind neck
exercises.nameRu: Тяга сверху на блоке за голову широким хватом
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the cable machine so that the pulldown bar is at a height above your head.
Step:2 Sit down on the seat and grab the pulldown bar with a wide overhand grip.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and your chest up as you lean back slightly.
Step:4 Pull the bar down towards your upper chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly release the bar back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Sit down on the cable pulldown machine and grab the v-bar attachment with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Adjust the knee pad so that your thighs are secured under it.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and lean back slightly.
Step:4 Pull the v-bar down towards your upper chest while keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:5 Squeeze your back muscles at the bottom of the movement.
Step:6 Slowly return the v-bar to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameRu: Тяга верхнего блока с прямой рукояткой
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the cable pulley to a high position and attach a straight bar.
Step:2 Sit facing the cable machine with your feet flat on the ground and your knees slightly bent.
Step:3 Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Lean back slightly and keep your chest up, maintaining a slight arch in your lower back.
Step:5 Pull the bar down towards your chest, leading with your elbows and squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly return the bar to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameRu: Пуловер со штангой на скамье с отриц. наклоном
instructions: Step:1 Lie on a decline bench with your head lower than your hips and your feet secured.
Step:2 Hold a barbell with a wide grip and extend your arms straight above your chest.
Step:3 Lower the barbell behind your head in a controlled manner, keeping your arms straight.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then raise the barbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameRu: Тяга сверху с лентой одной рукой
instructions: Step:1 Attach the band to a sturdy anchor point above your head.
Step:2 Kneel down and hold the band with one hand, palm facing down.
Step:3 Extend your arm fully overhead, keeping your elbow slightly bent.
Step:4 Engage your lat muscles and pull the band down towards your side, bringing your elbow towards your ribcage.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly release the tension and return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
Step:1 Grab the pull-up bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Hang from the bar with your arm fully extended and your body straight.
Step:3 Engage your core and pull your body up towards the bar by bending your elbow and squeezing your back muscles.
Step:4 Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar.
Step:5 Lower your body back down to the starting position with control.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Adjust the leverage machine to your desired resistance level.
Step:2 Stand on the foot platform and grip the handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Hang with your arms fully extended, keeping your body straight.
Step:4 Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the handles, leading with your chest.
Step:5 Continue pulling until your chin is above the handles.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Grab the pull-up bar with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Hang from the bar with your arms fully extended and your body straight.
Step:3 Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the bar, leading with your chest.
Step:4 Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Attach a straight bar to a high pulley cable machine.
Step:2 Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart and a slight bend in your knees.
Step:3 Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, keeping your arms straight and your palms facing down.
Step:4 Engage your core and keep your back straight as you exhale and push the bar down towards your thighs.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly return the bar to the starting position while inhaling.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Adjust the machine to your desired weight and height.
Step:2 Place your hands on the parallel bars with a close grip, palms facing each other.
Step:3 Hang from the bars with your arms fully extended and your feet off the ground.
Step:4 Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the bars, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:5 Continue pulling until your chin is above the bars.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Attach a rope to the cable machine at the highest setting.
Step:2 Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the rope with both hands, palms facing down.
Step:4 Extend your arms fully in front of you, keeping your elbows slightly bent.
Step:5 Engage your lats and slowly pull the rope down towards your thighs, keeping your arms straight.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly release the tension and return to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameEn: lever one arm lateral wide pulldown
exercises.nameRu: Тяга сверху в рычажном тренажёре одной рукой
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your chest against the pad and your feet flat on the floor.
Step:2 Grasp the handle with an overhand grip and fully extend your arm, keeping a slight bend in your elbow.
Step:3 Pull the handle down and across your body towards your opposite hip, squeezing your lat muscle at the bottom of the movement.
Step:4 Slowly return the handle to the starting position, fully extending your arm.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
Step:1 Adjust the cable pulldown machine so that the seat is at a comfortable height and the knee pad is secured.
Step:2 Sit on the seat with your back straight and your feet flat on the ground.
Step:3 Grasp the cable bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Lean back slightly and engage your core.
Step:5 Pull the cable bar down towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly release the bar back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Adjust the machine to fit your body and select the desired weight.
Step:2 Lie face down on the machine with your legs straight and your heels against the padded lever.
Step:3 Grasp the handles or the sides of the machine for stability.
Step:4 Keeping your upper body stationary, exhale and curl your legs up as far as possible without lifting your hips off the pad.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your hamstrings.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly lower the lever back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Adjust the machine to fit your body and sit on it with your back against the backrest.
Step:2 Place your lower legs under the padded lever, just above your ankles.
Step:3 Grasp the handles on the sides of the machine for support.
Step:4 Keeping your upper legs stationary, exhale and curl your legs up as far as possible.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your hamstrings.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly lower the lever back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Adjust the cable machine so that the ankle attachment is at the lowest setting.
Step:2 Lie face down on the bench with your legs straight and the ankle attachment secured to your ankles.
Step:3 Hold onto the handles of the bench for stability.
Step:4 Keeping your upper body stationary, exhale and curl your legs up towards your glutes by flexing your knees.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your hamstrings.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly lower your legs back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Adjust the machine to fit your body and select the desired weight.
Step:2 Kneel on the machine facing downwards, with your knees resting on the pad and your feet secured under the footpads.
Step:3 Grasp the handles or the sides of the machine for stability.
Step:4 Keeping your upper body stationary, exhale and curl your legs up towards your glutes by flexing your knees.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your hamstrings.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly lower your legs back to the starting position, fully extending your knees.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in front of your thighs.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:3 Lower the kettlebell towards the ground, allowing it to swing between your legs.
Step:4 Quickly extend your hips and knees, using the momentum to swing the kettlebell up to shoulder height.
Step:5 As the kettlebell reaches shoulder height, rotate your wrists and catch the kettlebell in the rack position, with your elbow tucked in and the kettlebell resting on your forearm.
Step:6 Lower the kettlebell back down to the starting position between your legs, and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Stand with your feet hip-width apart and your hands on your hips.
Step:2 Shift your weight onto your left leg and lift your right foot off the ground, bending your knee.
Step:3 Slowly curl your right heel towards your glutes, squeezing your hamstring.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your right foot back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs.

exercises.nameEn: inverse leg curl (on pull-up cable machine)
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the cable machine so that the ankle straps are at the lowest setting.
Step:2 Lie face down on the bench with your legs extended and the ankle straps attached to your feet.
Step:3 Hold onto the handles of the bench for stability.
Step:4 Bend your knees and curl your legs towards your glutes, squeezing your hamstrings.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly lower your legs back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameEn: self assisted inverse leg curl (on floor)
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your legs extended and your arms by your sides.
Step:2 Bend your knees and place your feet flat on the ground, hip-width apart.
Step:3 Lift your hips off the ground, engaging your glutes and hamstrings.
Step:4 Slowly curl your legs towards your glutes, keeping your hips lifted.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly extend your legs back to the starting position.
Step:6 Lower your hips back down to the ground.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Lie face down on a leg curl machine with your legs extended and your ankles hooked under the padded lever.
Step:2 Place your hands on the side handles of the machine for support.
Step:3 Keeping your upper body stationary, exhale and curl your legs upward as far as possible.
Step:4 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your hamstrings.
Step:5 Slowly lower your legs back to the starting position while inhaling.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameRu: Сгибание в рычажном тренажёре одной ногой лёжа
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the machine to fit your body and sit on it with your back against the backrest.
Step:2 Place your legs on the lever pad, just above your ankles.
Step:3 Grasp the handles on the sides of the machine for support.
Step:4 Keeping your upper body still, exhale and curl your legs up towards your glutes.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower your legs back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Start with the barbell on the ground in front of you, with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Bend down and grip the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and chest up as you lift the barbell off the ground, extending your hips and knees.
Step:4 As the barbell reaches your mid-thigh, explosively pull it upwards, shrugging your shoulders and pulling your elbows high and to the sides.
Step:5 As the barbell reaches its highest point, quickly drop underneath it, rotating your elbows around and catching the barbell on your shoulders in a front squat position.
Step:6 Stand up with the barbell, fully extending your hips and knees.
Step:7 Lower the barbell back down to the starting position, keeping control of the weight throughout the movement.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Lie flat on your back on a mat or bench with your legs extended.
Step:2 Place your hands by your sides or under your glutes for support.
Step:3 Bend your knees and lift your feet off the ground, bringing your thighs towards your chest.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand.
Step:2 Take a step forward with your right foot, keeping your back straight and core engaged.
Step:3 Lower your body by bending both knees until your right thigh is parallel to the ground.
Step:4 Push through your right heel to return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat with your left leg.
Step:6 Alternate legs for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Lie face down on a stability ball with your hips resting on the ball and your legs extended straight behind you.
Step:2 Place your hands on the ground in front of you for stability.
Step:3 Engaging your glutes and hamstrings, lift your legs up towards the ceiling as high as you can.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Lie on your back with your legs extended.
Step:2 Bend your right knee and place your right ankle on your left thigh, just above the knee.
Step:3 Grasp your left thigh with both hands and gently pull it towards your chest.
Step:4 Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds.
Step:5 Release and repeat on the other side.

exercises.nameEn: single leg bridge with outstretched leg
instructions: Step:1 Lie on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Extend one leg straight out in front of you.
Step:3 Engage your glutes and lift your hips off the ground, forming a straight line from your knees to your shoulders.
Step:4 Hold for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs.

exercises.nameEn: resistance band hip thrusts on knees (female)
instructions: Step:1 Start by kneeling on the ground with your knees hip-width apart and your feet flexed.
Step:2 Wrap the resistance band around your thighs, just above your knees.
Step:3 Place your hands on your hips or extend them out in front of you for balance.
Step:4 Engage your glutes and core muscles.
Step:5 Push your hips forward and squeeze your glutes as you lift your knees off the ground, extending your hips until your thighs are parallel to the ground.
Step:6 Hold the position for a moment, then slowly lower your knees back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameRu: Жим ногами в тренажёре Prowler (45° вид сзади)
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat of the sled machine so that your knees are at a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Sit on the sled machine with your back against the backrest and your feet shoulder-width apart on the footplate.
Step:3 Grip the handles on the sides of the seat for stability.
Step:4 Push the footplate away from your body by extending your legs, keeping your heels on the footplate.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the fully extended position.
Step:6 Slowly bend your knees and lower the footplate back towards your body, controlling the movement.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart and a barbell resting on your upper back.
Step:2 Take a step forward with your right foot, keeping your torso upright.
Step:3 Lower your body by bending your right knee until your thigh is parallel to the ground.
Step:4 Push through your right heel to return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat with your left leg, alternating legs for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameEn: exercise ball one leg prone lower body rotation
instructions: Step:1 Lie face down on the stability ball with your hips resting on the ball and your legs extended straight behind you.
Step:2 Place your hands on the ground in front of you for support.
Step:3 Engage your glutes and core muscles to stabilize your body.
Step:4 Slowly lift one leg off the ground, keeping it straight and parallel to the floor.
Step:5 Rotate your leg outward, away from your body, while keeping your hips and upper body stable.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the end of the rotation, then slowly return your leg to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat the rotation with the other leg.
Step:8 Continue alternating legs for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand.
Step:2 Take a step backward with your right foot, lowering your body into a lunge position.
Step:3 Bend your left knee and lower your body until your left thigh is parallel to the ground.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then push through your left heel to return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat on the other side, stepping back with your left foot.

exercises.nameEn: glute bridge two legs on bench (male)
exercises.nameRu: Ягодичный мост двумя ногами на скамье
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the edge of a bench with your back against it and your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place your hands on the bench beside your hips for support.
Step:3 Engage your glutes and hamstrings, then lift your hips off the bench until your body forms a straight line from your knees to your shoulders.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a weight in each hand.
Step:2 Take a step forward with your right foot, lowering your body into a lunge position.
Step:3 As you lunge forward, swing the weights forward and upward, keeping your arms straight.
Step:4 Push off with your right foot and return to the starting position, swinging the weights back down.
Step:5 Repeat with your left foot and continue alternating legs for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Start by lying flat on your back on the ground with your knees bent and feet flat on the floor.
Step:2 Place a barbell across your hips, holding it securely with both hands.
Step:3 Engage your glutes and core muscles, then lift your hips off the ground until your body forms a straight line from your knees to your shoulders.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your glutes.
Step:5 Slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Take a step forward with your right foot, keeping your back straight.
Step:3 Lower your body by bending your knees until your right thigh is parallel to the ground.
Step:4 Push through your right heel to return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat with your left leg.
Step:6 Continue alternating legs for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your legs extended and your hands by your sides.
Step:2 Engage your core and lift your legs off the ground about 6 inches.
Step:3 Keeping your legs straight, alternate lifting one leg slightly higher than the other.
Step:4 Continue this fluttering motion for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameEn: barbell glute bridge two legs on bench (male)
instructions: Step:1 Start by sitting on the edge of a bench with your upper back resting against it and your feet flat on the ground, hip-width apart.
Step:2 Place a barbell across your hips, holding it securely with both hands.
Step:3 Engage your glutes and core muscles, then press through your heels to lift your hips off the bench, creating a straight line from your knees to your shoulders.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your glutes.
Step:5 Slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameRu: Жим ногами в тренажёре Prowler (45° вид спереди)
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat and footplate of the sled machine to a comfortable position.
Step:2 Sit on the sled machine with your back against the backrest and your feet shoulder-width apart on the footplate.
Step:3 Grip the handles on the sides of the seat for stability.
Step:4 Push the footplate away from your body by extending your legs, keeping your heels on the footplate.
Step:5 Continue pushing until your legs are almost fully extended, but without locking your knees.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly lower the footplate back towards your body by bending your knees.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Adjust the machine to fit your body and sit on it with your back against the backrest.
Step:2 Place your feet on the footrests and grip the handles for stability.
Step:3 Engage your glutes and hamstrings, then push against the footrests to extend your hips and raise your legs backward.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Lie face down on a flat bench with your hips at the edge and your legs hanging off the bench.
Step:2 Hold onto the bench for stability.
Step:3 Keeping your legs straight, raise them up towards the ceiling as high as you can.
Step:4 Squeeze your glutes at the top of the movement.
Step:5 Slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameRu: Жим ногами в тренажёре Prowler (45° вид сбоку)
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat of the sled machine so that your knees are at a 90-degree angle when your feet are on the footplate.
Step:2 Sit on the sled machine with your back flat against the backrest and your feet shoulder-width apart on the footplate.
Step:3 Grip the handles on the sides of the seat for stability.
Step:4 Push against the footplate to extend your legs, straightening them completely.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly bend your knees to lower the footplate back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Lie on your back with your legs straight and a resistance band looped around your feet.
Step:2 Bend your knees and bring them towards your chest, keeping your feet together.
Step:3 Slowly rotate your knees outwards, away from each other, while keeping your feet together.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the end of the rotation, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameEn: exercise ball one legged diagonal kick hamstring curl
instructions: Step:1 Start by lying on your back with your legs extended and your heels resting on top of the stability ball.
Step:2 Place your arms by your sides for stability.
Step:3 Engage your glutes and core muscles to lift your hips off the ground, creating a straight line from your shoulders to your heels.
Step:4 Bend your right knee and bring it towards your chest, keeping your left leg extended and your foot flexed.
Step:5 Kick your right leg diagonally across your body, extending it fully and engaging your hamstrings.
Step:6 Slowly return your right leg to the starting position, maintaining control and stability.
Step:7 Repeat the movement with your left leg, alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell across your upper back.
Step:2 Take a step backward with your right foot, landing on the ball of your foot.
Step:3 Bend both knees to lower your body until your left thigh is parallel to the ground.
Step:4 Push through your left heel to return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat with the other leg.
Step:1 Adjust the leverage machine to fit your body and secure your feet in the foot pads.
Step:2 Lie face down on the machine with your upper body hanging off the edge and your hips resting on the pad.
Step:3 Cross your arms over your chest or place them behind your head.
Step:4 Engage your glutes and hamstrings to lift your legs upward until they are parallel to the ground.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameRu: Жим в рычажном тренажёре одной ногой
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat of the machine so that your knees are at a 90-degree angle when your feet are on the footplate.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your back against the backrest and your feet shoulder-width apart on the footplate.
Step:3 Place your hands on the handles or sides of the machine for stability.
Step:4 Push the footplate away from your body by extending your leg, keeping your back against the backrest.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the fully extended position, then slowly bend your leg to return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs.

exercises.nameEn: assisted lying gluteus and piriformis stretch
instructions: Step:1 Lie on your back with your legs extended.
Step:2 Bend your right knee and place your right ankle on your left thigh, just above the knee.
Step:3 Grasp your left thigh with both hands and gently pull it towards your chest.
Step:4 Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds.
Step:5 Release the stretch and repeat on the other side.
Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Take a step forward with your right leg, lowering your body into a lunge position.
Step:3 Keep your torso upright and your front knee aligned with your ankle.
Step:4 Push off with your right foot and bring your left foot forward, stepping into a lunge position with your left leg.
Step:5 Continue alternating legs and walking forward, maintaining a controlled and steady pace.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Attach a cable to a low pulley and stand facing away from the machine.
Step:2 Place the cable around your ankle and stand with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Keep your core engaged and your back straight throughout the exercise.
Step:4 Slowly extend your leg straight back, squeezing your glutes at the top of the movement.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:7 Switch sides and repeat with the other leg.

exercises.nameRu: Ягодичный мост с наклоном таза лёжа
instructions: Step:1 Lie on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place your arms by your sides with your palms facing down.
Step:3 Engage your glutes and core muscles.
Step:4 Tilt your pelvis upward, lifting your hips off the ground.
Step:5 Hold the bridge position for a few seconds.
Step:6 Slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart and a barbell resting on your upper back.
Step:2 Take a step backward with your right foot, landing on the ball of your foot.
Step:3 Bend both knees to lower your body until your left thigh is parallel to the ground.
Step:4 Push through your left heel to return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat with the other leg.
Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Engage your glutes and lift your hips off the ground, forming a straight line from your knees to your shoulders.
Step:3 While keeping your hips lifted, lift one foot off the ground and bring your knee towards your chest.
Step:4 Lower your foot back to the ground and repeat the movement with the other leg.
Step:5 Continue alternating legs in a marching motion while maintaining the bridge position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Bend your knees and lower your body down into a squat position.
Step:3 As you squat down, bring your knees up towards your chest and hug them with your arms.
Step:4 Hold this position for a moment, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameRu: Мост на скамье с отриц. наклоном
instructions: Step:1 Lie on your back with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent.
Step:2 Place your arms by your sides with your palms facing down.
Step:3 Engage your glutes and hamstrings, and lift your hips off the ground until your body forms a straight line from your knees to your shoulders.
Step:4 Hold this position for a few seconds, then slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Sit on a chair or bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place a resistance band around your thighs, just above your knees.
Step:3 Keep your knees bent at a 90-degree angle and your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Engage your glutes and slowly rotate your knees outward, pushing against the resistance of the band.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameRu: Жим одной ногой в тренажёре Prowler 45°
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the sled machine to a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Sit on the sled machine with your back against the pad and your feet on the footplate.
Step:3 Place one foot on the footplate and extend your leg, pushing the sled away from you.
Step:4 Slowly bend your knee and lower the sled back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat with the other leg.
Step:6 Continue alternating legs for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Stand with your back against a wall and your feet hip-width apart.
Step:2 Slowly slide your back down the wall until your knees are bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:3 Lift your right foot off the ground and bring your knee towards your chest.
Step:4 Lower your right foot back down and lift your left foot off the ground, bringing your knee towards your chest.
Step:5 Continue alternating between lifting your right and left foot for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand.
Step:2 Take a step forward with your right foot, lowering your body into a lunge position.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and your chest up as you lower your body.
Step:4 Push through your right heel to return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat with your left leg.
Step:6 Alternate legs for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Start by sitting on the ground with your legs extended in front of you.
Step:2 Place the roller under your glutes, just above your knees.
Step:3 Lean back and place your hands on the ground behind you for support.
Step:4 Engage your glutes and slowly roll the roller forward, bending your knees and bringing them towards your chest.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, feeling a stretch in your glutes.
Step:6 Slowly roll the roller back to the starting position, extending your legs.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Start by kneeling on the ground with the roller positioned under your hips.
Step:2 Place your hands on the roller for support.
Step:3 Slowly roll the roller forward, extending your hips and stretching your glutes.
Step:4 Hold the stretch for a few seconds, then roll back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Bend your knees and lower your hips into a squat position, keeping your back straight and chest up.
Step:3 Explosively extend your hips and knees, driving through your heels to jump off the ground.
Step:4 As you jump, shrug your shoulders and pull the dumbbells up towards your shoulders, keeping them close to your body.
Step:5 Catch the dumbbells at shoulder height, with your elbows pointing forward and your palms facing up.
Step:6 Lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position by reversing the movement.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a barbell across your upper back.
Step:2 Take a big step to the side with your right foot, keeping your left foot planted.
Step:3 Bend your right knee and lower your body down into a lunge position, keeping your left leg straight.
Step:4 Push off with your right foot and return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat on the other side, stepping with your left foot.
Step:1 Adjust the seat and footplate of the smith machine to a comfortable position.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your back against the backrest and your feet shoulder-width apart on the footplate.
Step:3 Grasp the handles or sides of the machine for stability.
Step:4 Push the footplate away from you by extending your legs, keeping your back against the backrest.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the fully extended position.
Step:6 Slowly bend your knees and lower the footplate back towards you, returning to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place your arms by your sides, palms facing down.
Step:3 Engage your glutes and core, then lift your hips off the ground until your body forms a straight line from your knees to your shoulders.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your glutes.
Step:5 Slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Sit on a bench or chair with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in one hand with an underhand grip, resting your forearm on your thigh, palm facing up.
Step:3 Allow the dumbbell to roll down to your fingertips, then curl it back up by flexing your fingers.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other hand.
Step:1 Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your forearms resting on your thighs, holding a barbell with an underhand grip.
Step:2 Allow the barbell to roll down to your fingertips, keeping your wrists straight.
Step:3 Slowly curl the barbell up towards your forearms by flexing your wrists.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Sit on a bench or chair with your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold the band with an overhand grip, palms facing down, and wrap it around your fingers.
Step:3 Rest your forearms on your thighs, with your wrists hanging off the edge.
Step:4 Slowly curl your wrists upward, squeezing your forearms.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your wrists back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent.
Step:2 Hold a barbell with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and your hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Rest your forearms on your thighs, allowing your wrists to hang off the edge.
Step:4 Slowly curl your wrists upward, bringing the barbell towards your forearms.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameEn: barbell palms down wrist curl over a bench
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your forearms resting on your thighs, palms facing down.
Step:2 Hold a barbell with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Lower the barbell towards the ground by flexing your wrists, keeping your forearms stationary.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly raise the barbell back up by extending your wrists.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameEn: dumbbell one arm seated neutral wrist curl
exercises.nameRu: Сгибание запястья одной рукой сидя с гантелью
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing up.
Step:2 Rest your forearm on your thigh, allowing your wrist to hang off the edge.
Step:3 Keeping your forearm stationary, curl your wrist upward as far as possible.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your wrist back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other hand.
exercises._original_nameRu: Сгибание с гантелями одной рукой сидя

instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Rest the barbell on the back of your hands with your palms facing down and your fingers pointing towards your body.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl your wrists upwards as far as possible.
Step:4 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause, then inhale and slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameEn: barbell palms up wrist curl over a bench
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a barbell with an underhand grip, palms facing up.
Step:2 Rest your forearms on the bench, allowing your wrists to hang off the edge.
Step:3 Keeping your forearms stationary, exhale and curl your wrists upwards as far as possible.
Step:4 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause, then inhale and slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a barbell with an overhand grip, palms facing down.
Step:2 Rest your forearms on your thighs, allowing your wrists to hang off the edge.
Step:3 Slowly curl your wrists upward, bringing the barbell towards your body.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Attach a straight bar to a low pulley cable machine.
Step:2 Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the bar with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and your hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Rest your forearms on a bench or pad, with your wrists hanging off the edge.
Step:5 Keeping your forearms stationary, exhale and curl your wrists upward as far as possible.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the bar back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameEn: dumbbell seated palms up wrist curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing up.
Step:2 Rest your forearms on your thighs, allowing your wrists to hang off the edge.
Step:3 Slowly curl your wrists upward, squeezing your forearms at the top of the movement.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then lower your wrists back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent.
Step:2 Hold a barbell with an overhand grip, palms facing down, and your hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Rest your forearms on your thighs, allowing your wrists to hang off the edge.
Step:4 Keeping your forearms stationary, exhale and curl your wrists upward as far as possible.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause, then inhale and slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameEn: dumbbell over bench one arm reverse wrist curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing down.
Step:2 Rest your forearm on the bench with your wrist hanging off the edge.
Step:3 Slowly curl your wrist upwards, bringing the dumbbell towards your forearm.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
Step:1 Sit on a bench in front of a Smith machine with your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Grasp the barbell with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Rest your forearms on your thighs, allowing your wrists to hang off.
Step:4 Slowly curl your wrists upward, bringing the barbell towards your forearms.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Extend your arms straight out in front of you.
Step:2 Make a fist with both hands.
Step:3 Rotate your wrists in a circular motion, keeping your arms still.
Step:4 Continue the wrist circles for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Stand facing the smith machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and your elbows close to your body.
Step:4 Slowly curl your wrists upwards, bringing the barbell towards your body.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameEn: dumbbell over bench revers wrist curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing down.
Step:2 Rest your forearms on the bench, allowing your wrists to hang off the edge.
Step:3 Slowly curl your wrists upward, bringing the dumbbells towards your body.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameEn: dumbbell one arm reverse wrist curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench or chair with your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in one hand with an overhand grip, palm facing down.
Step:3 Rest your forearm on your thigh, with your wrist hanging off the edge.
Step:4 Slowly lower the dumbbell towards the ground by flexing your wrist.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly curl your wrist back up towards your body.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
Step:1 Sit on a bench or chair with your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold the band with both hands, palms facing up, and rest your forearms on your thighs.
Step:3 Slowly curl your wrists upward, squeezing your forearms.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your wrists back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Sit on a bench or chair with your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in one hand with an underhand grip, resting your forearm on your thigh.
Step:3 Allow your wrist to extend, letting the dumbbell roll down towards your fingers.
Step:4 Slowly curl your wrist back up, bringing the dumbbell towards your forearm.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other hand.
Step:1 Stand facing a cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Hold the cable handle with an overhand grip, palms facing down.
Step:3 Keep your arms straight and your elbows close to your sides.
Step:4 Slowly curl your wrists upward, bringing the cable handle towards your body.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the cable handle back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Sit on a bench with your forearms resting on the bench and your palms facing up, holding a dumbbell in each hand.
Step:2 Allow your wrists to hang over the edge of the bench.
Step:3 Slowly curl your wrists upward, squeezing your forearms at the top of the movement.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then slowly lower your wrists back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameRu: Подъём на грудь с гирей попеременные
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in each hand with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and chest up.
Step:3 Allow the kettlebells to hang in front of your body with your arms fully extended.
Step:4 In one fluid motion, explosively extend your hips, shrug your shoulders, and pull the kettlebells up towards your shoulders.

Step:5 As the kettlebells reach shoulder height, rotate your wrists and catch the kettlebells in the rack position, with your palms facing inward and the kettlebells resting on the outside of your forearms.
Step:6 Lower the kettlebells back down to the starting position and repeat the movement with the opposite arm.
Step:7 Continue alternating arms for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Attach a cable to a low pulley and sit on a bench facing the cable machine.
Step:2 Grasp the cable handle with an overhand grip, palms facing down.
Step:3 Rest your forearms on your thighs, with your wrists hanging off the edge.
Step:4 Keeping your forearms stationary, exhale and curl your wrists upward as far as possible.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower your wrists back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameEn: dumbbell over bench one arm wrist curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing down.
Step:2 Rest your forearm on the bench with your wrist hanging off the edge.
Step:3 Slowly curl your wrist upwards, bringing the dumbbell towards your forearm.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
Step:1 Sit on a bench or chair with your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip, palms facing down.
Step:3 Rest your forearms on your thighs, allowing your wrists to hang off the edge.
Step:4 Slowly curl your wrists upward, bringing the dumbbells towards your body.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in one hand at shoulder level, palm facing forward.
Step:2 Press the dumbbell upward until your arm is fully extended overhead.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Hold the cable handle with your arm extended in front of you, parallel to the ground.
Step:3 Keep your elbow slightly bent and your shoulder blades pulled back.
Step:4 Slowly rotate your arm outward, away from your body, while keeping your elbow in the same position.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Lie on your side on a flat bench with your upper arm against your side and your elbow bent 90 degrees.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in your hand with your palm facing down.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arm against your side, slowly rotate your forearm upward as far as possible.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your forearm back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and grasp the cable handle with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Keep your back straight and your core engaged.
