Step:3 Raise the cable handle in front of you, keeping your arms straight and your palms facing down.
Step:4 Continue lifting until your arms are parallel to the floor.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the cable handle back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in each hand at shoulder height.
Step:2 Press one kettlebell overhead, fully extending your arm.
Step:3 Lower the kettlebell back to shoulder height.
Step:4 Repeat with the other arm.
Step:5 Continue alternating arms for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Attach a D-handle to a low pulley cable machine and lie face down on a flat bench.
Step:2 Grasp the D-handle with each hand, palms facing down, and extend your arms straight out in front of you.
Step:3 Keeping your arms straight, raise them out to the sides until they are parallel to the floor.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your body.
Step:2 Raise your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the ground, keeping your elbows slightly bent.
Step:3 Rotate your arms externally, bringing the dumbbells up towards your head while keeping your elbows in the same position.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing inwards.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and chest up.
Step:3 Raise your arms out to the sides, keeping a slight bend in your elbows, until they are parallel to the floor.
Step:4 Rotate your arms so that your palms are facing downwards.
Step:5 Slowly lower your arms back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameRu: Подъём с гантелями на наклонной скамье
instructions: Step:1 Set an incline bench to a 45-degree angle and sit on it with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing inwards.
Step:2 Lean forward and let your arms hang straight down, perpendicular to the floor.
Step:3 Keeping your arms straight, raise them out to the sides until they are parallel to the floor, forming a 'T' shape with your body.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your body.
Step:2 Keep your back straight and engage your core.
Step:3 Raise your arms out to the sides, keeping a slight bend in your elbows, until they are parallel to the ground.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameEn: cable kneeling rear delt row (with rope) (male)
exercises.nameRu: Задняя дельта на блоке стоя на коленях (канат)
instructions: Step:1 Attach a rope handle to a low cable pulley and kneel down facing the machine.
Step:2 Grasp the rope with a neutral grip (palms facing each other) and extend your arms fully in front of you.
Step:3 Keeping your back straight and core engaged, pull the rope towards your body by retracting your shoulder blades.
Step:4 Squeeze your shoulder blades together at the end of the movement and hold for a brief pause.
Step:5 Slowly release the tension and return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameRu: Разведение в стороны с гантелями сидя
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and a dumbbell in each hand, resting on your thighs.
Step:2 Keep your back straight and core engaged.
Step:3 Raise the dumbbells to your sides with a slight bend in your elbows, until your arms are parallel to the ground.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and place the band under your feet.
Step:2 Hold the band handles with your palms facing each other and your arms extended in front of you.
Step:3 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:4 Pull the band towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly release the tension and return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameEn: dumbbell seated bent arm lateral raise
exercises.nameRu: Разведение в стороны с гантелями сидя
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your body and your arms bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:3 Keeping your elbows bent, raise your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the ground.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your body.
Step:2 Keep your back straight and engage your core.
Step:3 Raise your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the ground, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Next, raise your arms in front of you until they are parallel to the ground, again keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameEn: dumbbell incline one arm lateral raise
exercises.nameRu: Разведение в стороны с гантелями на наклонной скамье одной рукой
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an incline bench with a dumbbell in one hand, resting it on your thigh.
Step:2 Lean forward and position your upper arm against the inside of your thigh.
Step:3 Raise the dumbbell to the side, keeping your arm slightly bent and your palm facing down.
Step:4 Continue lifting until your arm is parallel to the floor.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.

exercises.nameRu: Подъём перед собой с гантелями сидя
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and a dumbbell in each hand, resting on your thighs.
Step:2 Keep your back straight and core engaged.
Step:3 Raise the dumbbells in front of you, with your palms facing down, until they are at shoulder level.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in one hand at shoulder height.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and engage your core.
Step:3 Press the kettlebell overhead in a straight line, fully extending your arm.
Step:4 As you press the kettlebell overhead, simultaneously dip your knees and quickly straighten them to generate momentum.
Step:5 As the kettlebell reaches its highest point, quickly drop underneath it by bending your knees and hips.
Step:6 Catch the kettlebell with a slight bend in your knees and hips, and your arm fully extended overhead.
Step:7 Stand up straight, fully extending your knees and hips, and stabilize the kettlebell overhead.
Step:8 Lower the kettlebell back to the starting position by bending your knees and hips, and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameRu: Жим плеч в рычажном тренажёре v2
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and backrest of the leverage machine to a comfortable position.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your back against the backrest and your feet flat on the floor.
Step:3 Grasp the handles of the machine with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Push the handles upward and forward until your arms are fully extended, but not locked.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the handles back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:3 Extend your arms straight down in front of you, palms facing each other.
Step:4 Keeping a slight bend in your elbows, raise your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the ground.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Sit on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward.
Step:2 Raise the dumbbells to shoulder height, with your elbows bent and palms facing forward.
Step:3 Press one dumbbell up overhead, fully extending your arm.
Step:4 Lower the dumbbell back down to shoulder height.
Step:5 Repeat with the other arm.
Step:6 Continue alternating arms for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and grasp the cable handle with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Keep your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:3 Raise the cable handle in front of you, keeping your arms straight and your palms facing down.
Step:4 Continue lifting until your arms are parallel to the floor.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the cable handle back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Attach a D-handle to each low pulley cable and stand in the middle of the cable crossover machine.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with a pronated grip (palms facing down) and take a step forward, positioning your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Bend your knees slightly and lean forward at the waist, keeping your back straight and your abs engaged.
Step:4 With your arms extended out to the sides and slightly bent at the elbows, exhale and squeeze your shoulder blades together as you pull the cables back and upward in a reverse fly motion.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the peak contraction, then inhale and slowly return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the barbell in front of your shoulders with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Press the barbell overhead, fully extending your arms.
Step:3 Lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameRu: Жим с гантелями попеременные стоя над головой
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at shoulder level with your palms facing forward.
Step:2 Press one dumbbell overhead, fully extending your arm.
Step:3 Lower the dumbbell back to shoulder level.
Step:4 Repeat with the other arm.
Step:5 Continue alternating arms for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an overhand grip, hands wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Let the barbell hang in front of your thighs, arms fully extended.
Step:3 Keeping your back straight, exhale and lift the barbell straight up towards your chin, leading with your elbows.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameRu: Разведение в стороны на блоке сидя
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench facing the cable machine with your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Grasp the cable handles with an overhand grip and extend your arms straight in front of you.
Step:3 Keeping your arms straight, slowly raise them out to the sides until they are parallel to the floor.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an overhand grip, palms facing down.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:3 Raise the barbell out to the sides, keeping your arms straight, until they are parallel to the ground.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Adjust the seat height so that the handles are at shoulder level.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your back against the pad and your feet flat on the floor.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and lift them off the supports, extending your arms fully.
Step:4 Lower the handles down to shoulder level, keeping your elbows slightly bent.
Step:5 Press the handles up overhead until your arms are fully extended.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the handles back down to shoulder level.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body.
Step:2 Keep your back straight and engage your core.
Step:3 Raise your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the floor, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameRu: Подъём перед собой с гантелями попеременные сидя
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your body and arms extended down by your sides.
Step:3 Keeping your arms straight, raise one dumbbell in front of you until it is parallel to the ground.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat with the other arm.
Step:6 Alternate between arms for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Let the barbell hang in front of your thighs, arms fully extended.
Step:3 Keeping your back straight and core engaged, exhale and lift the barbell straight up towards your chin, leading with your elbows.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameRu: Разведение в стороны с гантелями одной рукой
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in one hand with your palm facing your body.
Step:2 Keep your back straight and your core engaged throughout the exercise.
Step:3 Raise the dumbbell to the side, keeping your arm straight and your palm facing down.
Step:4 Continue lifting until your arm is parallel to the ground.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at shoulder height with your palms facing down.
Step:2 Keeping your core engaged and your elbows slightly bent, press the dumbbells up and overhead until your arms are fully extended.
Step:3 Rotate your wrists so that your palms are facing forward.
Step:4 Slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position, rotating your wrists back to the starting position as you do so.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameEn: kettlebell one arm military press to the side
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in one hand at shoulder height.
Step:2 Engage your core and keep your back straight.
Step:3 Press the kettlebell overhead, extending your arm fully.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the kettlebell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in front of your thighs with both hands, palms facing towards you.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge at the hips, lowering the kettlebell towards the ground.
Step:3 Explosively extend your hips and knees, using the momentum to pull the kettlebell up towards your shoulders.
Step:4 As the kettlebell reaches shoulder height, rotate your wrists and catch the kettlebell in the rack position, with your elbows tucked in and the kettlebell resting on the back of your forearm.
Step:5 Lower the kettlebell back down to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameRu: Разведение в стороны с гантелями лёжа
instructions: Step:1 Lie face down on a flat bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other.
Step:2 Extend your arms straight down towards the floor, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:3 Engaging your shoulder muscles, lift your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the floor.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and grasp the handles of the cable machine with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Position your hands at shoulder height, with your palms facing forward.
Step:3 Keep your core engaged and your back straight.
Step:4 Press one handle up and forward until your arm is fully extended.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the handle back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat with the other arm.
Step:7 Alternate between arms for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameRu: Разведение в стороны с гантелями на наклонной скамье
instructions: Step:1 Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Sit on the bench with your chest against the backrest and hold a dumbbell in each hand.
Step:3 Extend your arms straight down with your palms facing each other.
Step:4 Keeping a slight bend in your elbows, raise your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the ground.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and core engaged.
Step:3 Raise your arms out to the sides, keeping a slight bend in your elbows, until they are parallel to the floor.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a kettlebell in each hand at shoulder height, palms facing forward.
Step:3 Press the kettlebells overhead, fully extending your arms.
Step:4 Lower the kettlebells back to shoulder height.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body.
Step:2 Keep your back straight and engage your core.
Step:3 Raise your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the floor, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the band in front of your thighs with your palms facing inwards.
Step:2 Keep your arms straight and lift them up and out to the sides, forming a 'Y' shape with your body.
Step:3 Squeeze your shoulder blades together at the top of the movement.
Step:4 Slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, resting it on the front of your shoulders.
Step:3 Keeping your core engaged and back straight, lift the barbell up and away from your body, raising it to shoulder height.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameRu: Разведение в стороны на блоке одной рукой
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, facing the cable machine.
Step:2 Hold the cable handle with one hand, palm facing down, and stand far enough away from the machine so that there is tension on the cable.
Step:3 Keep your arm straight and slowly raise it out to the side until it is parallel to the ground.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arm back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
Step:1 Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Lift the barbell to shoulder height, keeping your elbows slightly bent and pointing forward.
Step:4 Press the barbell overhead, fully extending your arms.
Step:5 Lower the barbell back to shoulder height and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Attach the band to a stationary object at chest height.
Step:2 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the band with both hands in front of you.
Step:3 Keep your arms straight and lift them out to the sides until they are parallel to the ground.
Step:4 Squeeze your shoulder blades together at the top of the movement.
Step:5 Slowly lower your arms back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Attach a stirrup handle to a low cable pulley and stand facing the machine.
Step:2 Grasp the handle with your left hand and take a step back with your right foot, positioning your body at a slight angle.
Step:3 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:4 With your left arm extended and your palm facing down, pull the handle towards your chest by retracting your shoulder blade.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your shoulder blade.
Step:6 Slowly release the handle back to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:7 Switch sides and repeat the exercise with your right arm.
Step:1 Sit on a bench with back support and hold a dumbbell in each hand at shoulder level, palms facing your body and elbows bent.
Step:2 Press the dumbbells upward until your arms are fully extended and your palms are facing forward.
Step:3 Rotate your wrists as you lift, so that your palms are facing forward at the top of the movement.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at shoulder level.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and dip your body down, then explosively extend your legs and press the dumbbells overhead.
Step:3 Lock out your arms at the top of the movement, then lower the dumbbells back to shoulder level.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:3 Extend your arms straight down towards the ground, palms facing each other.
Step:4 Keeping a slight bend in your elbows, lift your arms out to the sides and squeeze your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your thighs.
Step:2 Keeping your arms straight, exhale and lift the dumbbells in front of you until they are at shoulder level.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameEn: cable standing cross-over high reverse fly
instructions: Step:1 Attach a D-handle to each side of a cable machine at shoulder height.
Step:2 Stand in the middle of the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and extend your arms out to the sides, palms facing forward.
Step:4 Keep a slight bend in your elbows and maintain a straight back throughout the exercise.
Step:5 Engage your shoulder muscles and squeeze your shoulder blades together as you pull the handles towards the front of your body.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameRu: Жим с гантелями стоя над головой
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at shoulder level with your palms facing forward.
Step:2 Press the dumbbells upward until your arms are fully extended overhead.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to shoulder level.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:3 Raise your arms out to the sides, keeping a slight bend in your elbows, until they are parallel to the ground.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Let the dumbbells hang in front of your thighs, with your arms fully extended.
Step:3 Keeping your back straight and your core engaged, exhale and lift the dumbbells straight up towards your chin, leading with your elbows.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the band in front of your thighs with your palms facing down.
Step:2 Keep your arms straight and lift the band up in front of you until your arms are parallel to the ground.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the band back down to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your body.
Step:2 Keep your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:3 Raise one dumbbell to the side, keeping your arm straight and your palm facing down.
Step:4 Continue lifting until your arm is parallel to the ground.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat with the other arm.
Step:7 Alternate between arms for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Sit on a bench with back support and hold a dumbbell in each hand at shoulder level, palms facing your body and elbows bent.
Step:2 Press the dumbbells upward until your arms are fully extended and your palms are facing forward.
Step:3 Rotate your wrists as you lift, so that your palms end up facing forward at the top of the movement.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and grasp the cable handles with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Keep your arms straight and your core engaged.
Step:3 Raise your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the floor.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Hold the cable handle with an overhand grip, palms facing down, and your arms fully extended in front of you.
Step:3 Keeping your arms straight, raise the cable handle up to shoulder level.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the cable handle back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at shoulder level with your palms facing inwards.
Step:2 Keeping your core engaged and your back straight, press the dumbbells upwards until your arms are fully extended overhead.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your thighs.
Step:2 Keep your back straight and engage your core.
Step:3 Slowly lift the dumbbells in front of you, with your arms straight, until they are at shoulder level.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the band in front of your thighs with your palms facing down.
Step:2 Keep your arms straight and slowly raise them forward until they are parallel to the ground.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameRu: Подъём с гантелями на наклонной скамье
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an incline bench with a dumbbell in each hand, resting on your thighs.
Step:2 Lean back on the bench and raise the dumbbells to shoulder height, palms facing forward.
Step:3 Keeping your back against the bench, exhale and raise the dumbbells above your head, fully extending your arms.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells back to shoulder height.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Keep your left hand up to protect your face and your right hand by your chin.
Step:3 Rotate your hips and pivot on your left foot as you extend your left arm forward in a punching motion.
Step:4 Twist your torso and engage your core muscles to generate power in the punch.
Step:5 Snap your arm back to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Sit on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, resting on your thighs.
Step:2 Raise the dumbbells to shoulder height, palms facing forward.
Step:3 Press the dumbbells upward until your arms are fully extended overhead.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to shoulder height.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameEn: dumbbell lying on floor rear delt raise
instructions: Step:1 Lie face down on the floor with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other.
Step:2 Extend your arms straight out in front of you, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:3 Engaging your shoulder muscles, lift your arms up and out to the sides, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Attach a rope handle to a low pulley cable machine.
Step:2 Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the rope handle with an overhand grip, palms facing each other.
Step:4 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:5 Keep your elbows slightly bent and pull the rope towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly release the tension and return to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameRu: Жим плеч в рычажном тренажёре v3
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and backrest of the leverage machine to a comfortable position.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your back against the backrest and your feet flat on the floor.
Step:3 Grasp the handles of the machine with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Push the handles upward and forward until your arms are fully extended, but not locked.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the handles back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in one hand with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Let the dumbbell hang at arm's length in front of your thighs, with your palm facing your body.
Step:3 Keeping your back straight and your core engaged, exhale and lift the dumbbell straight up towards your chin, leading with your elbow.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
Step:1 Sit on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward.
Step:2 Raise the dumbbells to shoulder height, elbows bent and palms facing forward.
Step:3 Press the dumbbells upward until your arms are fully extended overhead.
Step:4 Lower the dumbbells back to shoulder height.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Let the dumbbells hang in front of your thighs, with your arms fully extended and your palms facing your body.
Step:3 Keeping your back straight and your core engaged, exhale and lift the dumbbells straight up towards your chin, leading with your elbows.
Step:4 Continue lifting until the dumbbells are at shoulder height, with your elbows pointing out to the sides.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Let the barbell hang in front of your thighs, arms fully extended.
Step:3 Keeping your back straight, exhale and lift the barbell straight up towards your chin, leading with your elbows.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Let the barbell hang in front of your thighs, arms fully extended.
Step:3 Keeping your core engaged and back straight, exhale as you lift the barbell straight up towards your chin, leading with your elbows.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale as you slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameEn: kettlebell seated two arm military press
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a kettlebell in each hand at shoulder level with your palms facing forward.
Step:3 Press the kettlebells overhead by extending your arms fully.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the kettlebells back to shoulder level.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameEn: barbell standing front raise over head
exercises.nameRu: Подъём перед собой со штангой стоя
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a barbell in front of your thighs with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Keep your back straight and engage your core.
Step:3 Slowly raise the barbell in front of you, keeping your arms straight and your palms facing down.
Step:4 Continue lifting until the barbell is slightly above shoulder level.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell in front of your thighs with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Keep your arms straight and lift the barbell forward and upward until it reaches shoulder level.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Start in a kneeling position with your knees hip-width apart and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold a weight in each hand, with your arms extended straight down in front of you.
Step:3 Engage your core and swing the weights up and overhead, keeping your arms straight.
Step:4 Lower the weights back down to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Sit on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing inward.
Step:2 Raise the dumbbells to shoulder height, elbows bent and palms facing forward.
Step:3 Press the dumbbells upward until your arms are fully extended overhead.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to shoulder height.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Sit on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward.
Step:2 Raise the dumbbells to shoulder height, with your elbows bent and palms facing forward.
Step:3 Press the dumbbells upward until your arms are fully extended.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Sit on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, resting on your thighs.
Step:2 Lean back and position the dumbbells to the sides of your chest, palms facing forward.
Step:3 Press the dumbbells upward until your arms are fully extended.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameRu: Разведение в стороны с гантелями сидя
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and a dumbbell in each hand, resting on your thighs.
Step:2 Keep your back straight and core engaged.
Step:3 Raise the dumbbells to your sides with a slight bend in your elbows, until your arms are parallel to the ground.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameRu: Жим в рычажном тренажёре одной рукой
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back against the pad.
Step:2 Grasp the lever handle with one hand and position your elbow at a 90-degree angle.
Step:3 Press the lever upward until your arm is fully extended overhead.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the lever back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back against the backrest.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and position your hands at shoulder level.
Step:3 Push the handles upward until your arms are fully extended, but do not lock your elbows.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the handles back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at shoulder height with your palms facing down.
Step:2 Keeping your core engaged and your back straight, press the dumbbells straight up overhead until your arms are fully extended.
Step:3 Rotate your wrists so that your palms are facing forward.
Step:4 Lower the dumbbells back down to shoulder height, rotating your wrists back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameEn: dumbbell side lying one hand raise
instructions: Step:1 Lie on your side with your legs extended and your head supported by your arm.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in your top hand with your palm facing down.
Step:3 Keeping your arm straight, raise the dumbbell up to shoulder height.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back against the backrest.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and position your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Push the handles upward until your arms are fully extended, but do not lock your elbows.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the handles back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Sit on a bench or chair facing the cable machine with your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold the cable handle with your arm extended straight out in front of you, parallel to the ground.
Step:3 Keep your elbow slightly bent and your shoulder blades pulled back and down.
Step:4 Slowly rotate your arm inward, bringing the cable handle towards the center of your body.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

exercises.nameEn: dumbbell one arm lateral raise with support
exercises.nameRu: Разведение в стороны с гантелями одной рукой
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in one hand, with your palm facing your body.
Step:2 Place your other hand on a stable surface, such as a bench or wall, for support.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and engage your core.
Step:4 Raise the dumbbell out to the side, keeping your arm straight and your palm facing down.
Step:5 Continue lifting until your arm is parallel to the ground.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

exercises.nameEn: dumbbell standing one arm palm in press
exercises.nameRu: Жим с гантелями стоя одной рукой
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in one hand at shoulder height with your palm facing inwards.
Step:2 Engage your core and keep your back straight.
Step:3 Press the dumbbell upwards until your arm is fully extended.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your thighs.
Step:2 Keeping your arms straight, exhale and lift the dumbbells in front of you until they are at shoulder level.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in one hand at shoulder level.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and engage your core.
Step:3 Press the kettlebell overhead by extending your arm and fully extending your legs.
Step:4 Lower the kettlebell back to the starting position by bending your knees and bringing the kettlebell back to your shoulder.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

exercises.nameEn: dumbbell standing front raise above head
exercises.nameRu: Подъём перед собой с гантелями стоя
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Keep your arms straight and lift the dumbbells in front of you, raising them above your head.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameRu: Разведение в рычажном тренажёре сидя (задняя дельта)
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your chest against the pad and your feet flat on the floor.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and keep your arms slightly bent.
Step:3 Exhale and squeeze your shoulder blades together as you pull the handles back and outward, away from your body.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the peak contraction, then inhale and slowly return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameRu: Разведение в рычажном тренажёре сидя (задняя дельта, параллельный хват)
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your chest against the pad and your feet flat on the floor.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with a parallel grip, palms facing each other, and keep your arms slightly bent.
Step:3 Exhale and squeeze your shoulder blades together as you pull the handles back and outward, away from your body.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the peak contraction, then inhale and slowly return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Adjust the seat height of the smith machine so that the bar is at shoulder level.
Step:2 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent.
Step:3 Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Lift the bar off the rack and step back, maintaining a stable stance.
Step:5 Lower the bar down to the back of your neck, keeping your elbows pointing forward.
Step:6 Press the bar up overhead until your arms are fully extended.
Step:7 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the bar back down to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameRu: Разведение в стороны в рычажном тренажёре
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back against the pad.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and keep your arms straight.
Step:3 Exhale and raise your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the floor.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower your arms back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameRu: Задняя дельта с гантелями (подъём в наклоне)
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:3 Raise your arms out to the sides, keeping a slight bend in your elbows, until they are parallel to the floor.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameEn: dumbbell one arm shoulder press v. 2
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in one hand at shoulder level, palm facing forward.
Step:2 Engage your core and press the dumbbell straight up overhead, fully extending your arm.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to shoulder level.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the barbell behind your neck with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Keep your back straight and core engaged.
Step:3 Press the barbell overhead by extending your arms, fully extending your elbows.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameEn: cable standing rear delt row (with rope)
instructions: Step:1 Stand facing a cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Hold the cable attachment with both hands, palms facing each other, and step back to create tension in the cable.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:4 Pull the cable towards your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement, then slowly release the cable back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart and holding the ez barbell with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Raise the barbell to shoulder height, keeping your elbows slightly bent and your palms facing forward.
Step:3 Press the barbell overhead, extending your arms fully.
Step:4 Lower the barbell back to shoulder height and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in front of your chest with both hands, palms facing each other.
Step:2 Lower into a squat position by bending your knees and pushing your hips back, keeping your chest up and your back straight.
Step:3 As you reach the bottom of the squat, explosively drive through your heels to stand up, simultaneously pressing the kettlebell overhead.
Step:4 Lock out your arms at the top of the movement, fully extending your elbows.
Step:5 Lower the kettlebell back to the starting position by reversing the movement, bending your elbows and lowering the weight back to your chest.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Sit on a chair or bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold the resistance band with both hands, palms facing forward, and bring it up to shoulder level.
Step:3 Press the band overhead, extending your arms fully.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the band back down to shoulder level.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameEn: dumbbell lying one arm rear lateral raise
exercises.nameRu: Разведение в стороны с гантелями одной рукой лёжа
instructions: Step:1 Lie face down on a flat bench with a dumbbell in one hand, hanging towards the floor.
Step:2 Keep your arm straight and lift the dumbbell out to the side, away from your body.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at shoulder height.
Step:2 Press one dumbbell overhead while keeping the other dumbbell at shoulder height.
Step:3 Lower the pressed dumbbell back to shoulder height while pressing the other dumbbell overhead.
Step:4 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Adjust the incline level on the treadmill to your desired intensity.
Step:2 Stand on the treadmill with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Start walking at a comfortable pace, ensuring that you maintain proper form.
Step:4 Engage your core muscles and keep your back straight throughout the exercise.
Step:5 Continue walking on the incline treadmill for the desired duration of your cardio workout.
Step:6 Gradually decrease the incline and speed of the treadmill to cool down before stopping.
Step:1 Start on all fours with your hands directly under your shoulders and your knees directly under your hips.
Step:2 Lift your knees slightly off the ground, keeping your back flat and your core engaged.
Step:3 Move your right hand and left foot forward simultaneously, followed by your left hand and right foot.
Step:4 Continue crawling forward, alternating your hand and foot movements.
Step:5 Maintain a steady pace and keep your core tight throughout the exercise.
Step:6 Continue for the desired distance or time.

exercises.nameEn: dumbbell seated one leg calf raise - palm up
exercises.nameRu: Подъём на носки сидя с гантелью одной ногой (супинированный хват)
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench or chair with your back straight and your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in one hand and place it on top of your thigh, palm facing up.
Step:3 Lift one leg off the ground and extend it in front of you, keeping your knee slightly bent.
Step:4 Raise your heel as high as possible by pushing through the ball of your foot.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heel back down.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs and repeat.
exercises._original_nameRu: Подъём на носки с гантелями одной ногой сидя

exercises.nameEn: barbell standing rocking leg calf raise
exercises.nameRu: Подъём на носки со штангой стоя
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell across your upper back.
Step:2 Raise your heels off the ground as high as possible, balancing on the balls of your feet.
Step:3 Slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameRu: Подъём на носки со штангой сидя
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the floor and a barbell resting on your thighs.
Step:2 Place the balls of your feet on a raised platform, such as a block or step.
Step:3 Lower your heels as far as possible, feeling a stretch in your calves.
Step:4 Raise your heels as high as possible, contracting your calves.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameRu: Подъём на носки со штангой стоя
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and place a barbell across your upper back.
Step:2 Raise your heels off the ground as high as possible, using only your toes.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Place a barbell on the floor in front of you.
Step:2 Stand with the balls of your feet on the edge of the barbell, with your heels hanging off.
Step:3 Hold onto a stable object for balance if needed.
Step:4 Raise your heels as high as possible, using your calves to lift your body.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Stand on a raised platform with your toes on the edge and your heels hanging off.
Step:2 Hold onto a stable object for support.
Step:3 Raise your heels as high as possible by extending your ankles.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameEn: band two legs calf raise - (band under both legs) v. 2
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and place a resistance band under both feet.
Step:2 Hold the ends of the band with your hands for stability.
Step:3 Raise your heels off the ground as high as possible, using your calves.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Adjust the sled machine to an appropriate weight.
Step:2 Stand on the sled machine with one foot, keeping the other foot off the ground.
Step:3 Hold onto the handles for stability.
Step:4 Raise your heel as high as possible, lifting your body up on the ball of your foot.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heel back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:7 Switch legs and repeat the exercise.
Step:1 Adjust the seat of the leverage machine so that your shoulders are aligned with the lever pad.
Step:2 Place your toes on the lever pad, with your heels hanging off the edge.
Step:3 Grasp the handles or side supports for stability.
Step:4 Push the lever pad down by extending your ankles, contracting your calf muscles.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement.
Step:6 Slowly return to the starting position by allowing your heels to rise back up.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Adjust the sled machine to a comfortable weight and position yourself on the machine with your toes on the platform and your heels hanging off.
Step:2 Place your hands on the handles or the sides of the machine for support.
Step:3 Engage your calves and slowly raise your heels as high as possible, pushing against the resistance of the sled.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameEn: sled calf press on leg press
exercises.nameRu: Жим носками (голени) в тренажёре для жима ногами
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat of the leg press machine so that your knees are slightly bent when your feet are on the sled.
Step:2 Place your feet shoulder-width apart on the sled, with your toes pointing forward.
Step:3 Release the safety handles and push the sled away from you by extending your knees and ankles.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly lower the sled back down by bending your knees and ankles.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameEn: smith seated one leg calf raise
exercises.nameRu: Подъём на носки в Смите одной ногой сидя
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the machine with your back against the pad and your feet on the footrest.
Step:2 Place one leg on the footrest and keep the other leg off the footrest.
Step:3 Using your calf muscles, raise your heel as high as possible.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heel back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs and repeat.

exercises.nameEn: dumbbell seated one leg calf raise - hammer grip
exercises.nameRu: Подъём на носки сидя с гантелью одной ногой (хват-молот)
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench or chair with your feet flat on the ground and a dumbbell resting on your thighs.
Step:2 Place one foot on a raised surface, such as a step or block, with your heel hanging off the edge.
Step:3 Hold the dumbbell with a hammer grip, meaning your palms are facing each other and your fingers are wrapped around the handle.
Step:4 Keeping your core engaged and your back straight, slowly raise your heel as high as possible by pushing through the ball of your foot.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heel back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other leg.
exercises._original_nameRu: Подъём на носки с гантелями одной ногой сидя

exercises.nameEn: sled one leg calf press on leg press
exercises.nameRu: Жим ногами на санях одной ногой
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat of the leg press machine so that your knees are slightly bent when your feet are on the sled.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your back against the backrest and your feet on the sled, shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Place your toes and the balls of your feet on the sled, keeping your heels off.
Step:4 Push the sled forward by extending your ankles, keeping your knees slightly bent.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the sled back down by flexing your ankles.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Stand facing a wall or sturdy object with your feet hip-width apart.
Step:2 Hold the ends of the rope in each hand and place the middle of the rope around the ball of your right foot.
Step:3 Step back with your left foot, keeping your heel on the ground and your leg straight.
Step:4 Lean forward, keeping your back straight, and gently pull on the rope to stretch your calf.
Step:5 Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds, then release.
Step:6 Repeat on the other leg.

exercises.nameEn: exercise ball on the wall calf raise (tennis ball between knees)
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your back against a wall and place an exercise ball between your lower back and the wall.
Step:2 Position your feet shoulder-width apart and slightly in front of you.
Step:3 Hold a dumbbell in each hand, with your arms extended by your sides.
Step:4 Place a tennis ball between your knees.
Step:5 Raise your heels off the ground, lifting your body up onto your toes.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:1 Stand on the edge of a step or a sturdy platform with your heels hanging off and your toes on the step.
Step:2 Hold onto a railing or wall for balance if needed.
Step:3 Slowly raise your heels as high as possible, lifting your body weight onto the balls of your feet.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

Step:3 Hold onto the handles for stability.
Step:4 Raise your heels as high as possible by pushing through the balls of your feet.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameRu: Подъём на носки с гантелями одной ногой
instructions: Step:1 Stand on the edge of a step or platform with your heels hanging off and your toes on the step.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in one hand and place your other hand on a wall or railing for support.
Step:3 Raise your heel as high as possible, lifting your body up onto your toes.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heel back down below the step.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other leg.

exercises.nameEn: band single leg reverse calf raise
exercises.nameRu: Подъём на носки с лентой одной ногой
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet hip-width apart and place the band around the ball of your foot.
Step:2 Hold onto a stable object for balance.
Step:3 Slowly raise your heel off the ground, lifting your body weight onto the ball of your foot.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heel back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other leg.

exercises.nameRu: Подъёмы на носки сидя в тренажёре
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height so that your knees are slightly bent and your feet are flat on the footplate.
Step:2 Place your toes on the footplate with your heels hanging off the edge.
Step:3 Grasp the handles or the sides of the seat for stability.
Step:4 Push through the balls of your feet to raise your heels as high as possible.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameRu: Подъём на носки со штангой стоя
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and place a barbell across your upper back.
Step:2 Raise your heels off the ground as high as possible, using your calves.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameRu: Подъём на носки на блоке стоя
instructions: Step:1 Stand facing a cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Hold onto the cable machine handles or attach a cable ankle strap to your ankles.
Step:3 Raise your heels off the ground by extending your ankles as high as possible.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.nameEn: exercise ball on the wall calf raise (tennis ball between ankles)

Step:2 Place an exercise ball between the wall and your lower back.

Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
